1000612082.english: Oh, no. Wow... a hot spring? How amazing...

1000612083.english: Haha, Captain. Camel likes to soak in hot water like Grandma.
1000612083.korean: 후후, 대장님. 카멜은 할머니처럼 뜨거운 물에 몸을 푹 담그는 걸 좋아한대요.

1000612084.english: Hmm... I just found out about that.

1000612085.english: Ugh... Up until now, I've been in a situation where I've been so embarrassed that I can't even take a shower, let alone take a leisurely bath...
1000612085.korean: 으으... 지금까지는 느긋하게 목욕하기는 커녕 샤워도 감지덕지한 상황이었으니까요...

1000612086.english: So I just didn't say anything.

1000612087.english: If you had told me, I would have tried to do something about it. If I couldn't do it, I would have suggested it to the commander.
1000612087.korean: 말했으면 내가 어떻게든 해봤을텐데. 내 선에서 안된다면 사령관에게 건의했을거다.

1000612088.english: I thought so too. Both the Captain and the Commander are busy...
1000612088.korean: 그럴까봐 그랬죠. 대장님도 사령관님도 다 바쁘신데...

1000612089.english: How could you do that if you're not a werewolf?

1000612090.english: But since we found it, can't we use it when we don't have any big operations?
1000612090.korean: 그래도 찾은 김에, 큰 작전이 없을 때는 저희들도 쓸 수 있지 않을까요?

1000612091.english: If only the Commander would permit it...

1000612092.english: Of course you will allow it.

1000612093.english: I have Feather report to the Commander that he discovered the hot springs.
1000612093.korean: 나는 페더가 온천을 발견했다고 사령관에게 보고하도록 하지.

1000612096.english: Just a simple facility nearby... Oh, you must be busy preparing for the party...
1000612096.korean: 근처에 간단한 시설만... 아, 파티 준비때문에 바쁠텐데...

1000612097.english: I'll be able to find that much time. It would be good to get ready quickly and give the commander a rest.
1000612097.korean: 그정도 짬은 낼 수 있을거다. 어서 준비해서 사령관을 쉬게하는 것도 좋겠지.

1000612098.english: And the few remaining Metal Parasite near the cave...
1000612098.korean: 그리고 동굴 근방에 조금 남아있는 철충들이...

1000612099.english: I'll take care of that too!

1000612102.english: That's understandable. No matter how much the commander cares, life on a submarine is tough.
1000612102.korean: 그럴만 하지. 아무리 사령관이 신경써준다고 해도, 잠수함에서의 생활이니까.

1000612103.english: Hehehe. Let's go too. It would be best for you to check it out yourself, Captain.
1000612103.korean: 후훗. 저희도 어서 가요. 대장님도 직접 확인해보시는 게 좋겠어요.

1000612104.english: Ugh... I wonder if I can do it...

1000612105.english: This won't work. I'll have to read it again...

1000612106.english: Undine, I heard the news! You won the lottery!

1000612107.english: I want to play with the Commander too, but this time I'll give it to Undine.
1000612107.korean: 나도 사령관이랑 놀고 싶지만, 이번엔 운디네한테 양보할게.

1000612108.english: Congratulations! I didn't expect to be selected for Horizon, but it turned out really well.
1000612108.korean: 축하드려요. 저희 호라이즌에서 뽑힐 줄은 몰랐는데, 정말 잘 됐어요.

1000612109.english: Aren't there a lot of things to prepare? Why are you doing this?
1000612109.korean: 준비해야되는게 많지 않아? 왜 그러고 있어?

1000612110.english: I'm getting ready! I've got clothes and everything else I need...
1000612110.korean: 준비하고 있는거야! 옷이랑, 다, 다른 필요한 건 다 준비했어...

1000612111.english: Oh, that's the book you lent me. Are you reviewing it?
1000612111.korean: 아, 저한테 빌려주셨던 그 책이죠? 복습하고 계신건가요?

1000612112.english: You could say that, I, I know everything.
1000612112.korean: 그렇다고 할 수 있죠. 저, 저는 전부 알고 있으니까요.

1000612113.english: So, does that make Undine a great tsundere?
1000612113.korean: 그럼 운디네는 훌륭한 츤데레가 된 건가요?

1000612114.english: Well, of course. I'm already a tsundere.

1000612116.english: It is said to be an honorary title given only to very attractive women.
1000612116.korean: 아주 매력적인 여성에게만 붙는 명예로운 칭호라고 해요.

1000612119.english: By the way, Vice Captain, is it okay if I escort the Commander?
1000612119.korean: 그런데 부함장님. 제, 제가 사령관님 호위 해도 괜찮아요?

1000612121.english: Oh, no, that's... I thought it might be a bit of a rip-off...
1000612121.korean: 아, 아뇨 그게... 새치기 하는 건 아닌가 싶어서...

1000612123.english: You finally managed to make me laugh! That's awesome, that's awesome!
1000612123.korean: 드디어 날 웃기는데 성공했구나! 기특하다, 기특해!

1000612125.english: Vice Captain, don't laugh! I'm asking seriously...

1000612126.english: Don't worry about it. It was a fair draw, wasn't it?

1000612127.english: And I'm not confident that I can properly hide what we're preparing from the Commander.
1000612127.korean: 그리고 저는 사령관님 앞에서 저희가 준비하는 걸 제대로 숨길 자신도 없고요.

1000612128.english: That's right! If I were alone with Commander Neri, I'd probably tell him everything without even realizing it.
1000612128.korean: 맞아! 네리도 사령관이랑 단 둘이 있으면 나도 모르게 다 말해버릴걸?

1000612129.english: ...I also think it's really fortunate that Neri wasn't chosen.
1000612129.korean: ...네리가 안 뽑힌 건 나도 정말 다행이라고 생각해.

1000612130.english: Sigh... I guess I have no choice but to try as much as I can...
1000612130.korean: 에휴... 할 수 있는 만큼 해보는 수밖에 없나...

1000612131.english: I'm sure the Commander would also like having Undine by his side.
1000612131.korean: 분명 사령관님도 운디네가 옆에 있으면 좋아하실 거예요.

1000612132.english: Talon Feather took a lot of pictures for me...

1000612134.english: Undine, what would you do if you were alone with the Commander?
1000612134.korean: 운디네, 사령관이랑 단 둘이 있으면 뭐 할거야?

1000612135.english: What the heck are you asking?

1000612137.english: Even Undine, the great tsundere, seems embarrassed.

1000612138.english: Me too... um... holding hands with the Commander... phew, holding his arms...
1000612138.korean: 저도... 음... 사령관님이랑 손을 잡거나... 푸, 품에 안긴다거나...

1000612139.english: I feel embarrassed when I imagine that...

1000612140.korean: 그, 그래요. 손을 잡거나, 포옹을 하거나...

1000612144.english: Then I'll go get ready! See you later!
1000612144.korean: 그럼 저는 마저 준비하러 가볼게요! 나중에 봐요!

1000612145.english: Do your best and don't get pushed around by your companion!
1000612145.korean: 컴패니언에 밀리지 않게 잘 하고 와!

1000612146.english: Oh, and if you find anything delicious, bring it with you!
1000612146.korean: 아, 그리고 혹시 맛있는 거 발견하면 챙겨오고!

1000612147.english: - I walked through a city with a shopping mall that I had become so accustomed to.
1000612147.korean: - 이제는 익숙해질 대로 익숙해져버린 쇼핑몰이 있는 도시를 걸었다.

1000612148.english: - Undine, today's escort, looks a little excited.
1000612148.korean: - 오늘의 호위 담당인 운디네는 조금 들떠보인다.

1000612149.english: Wow, wow... It really was left this clean...
1000612149.korean: 우, 우와... 진짜로 이렇게 깨끗하게 남아있었구나...

1000612150.english: - Undine ran out at my words and stuck close to the shop window.
1000612150.korean: - 내 말에 달려나간 운디네가 쇼윈도에 바짝 붙었다.

1000612151.english: Tres bien! Everything is so luxurious!

1000612152.english: It's well managed... Even though it's late, I should at least say thank you to the AGSs I fought with earlier.
1000612152.korean: 관리도 잘 되어있고... 늦었지만 아까 싸운 AGS들한테 감사 인사라도 해야겠어.

1000612153.english: - Undine went into a nearby store and excitedly searched through various items.
1000612153.korean: - 근처 가게로 들어간 운디네가 신나게 이것저것 뒤적였다.

1000612154.english: - I feel proud and sorry at the same time.

1000612155.english: - I followed him into the store and sat down in a suitable spot.
1000612155.korean: - 뒤따라 가게로 들어가 적당한 곳에 앉았다.

1000612157.english: In the old days, you could fly freely in the dazzling sky and go out on deck and bask in the sun whenever you wanted!
1000612157.korean: 예전에는 눈부신 하늘을 마음껏 날아다니고, 언제든 갑판에 나가서 햇볕을 쬘 수 있었다구!

1000612158.english: No matter how big the Orca is, and no matter how much Fortune maintains it, it's still uncomfortable to bathe in, and it's humid...
1000612158.korean: 오르카 호가 아무리 크고, 또 포츈 님이 이것저것 정비해준다고 해도 목욕하기도 불편한데다, 습기차고...

1000612159.english: - Undine, who had been complaining loudly, looked at me as if she had heard me muttering.
1000612159.korean: - 내가 중얼거리는 것을 들었는지 한창 불만을 늘어놓던 운디네가 나를 바라봤다.

1000612160.english: Aaaah! That, that's a little inconvenient...!

1000612161.english: It's okay because the commander takes care of this and that.

1000612163.english: Right now... fighting for the Commander is more...
1000612163.korean: 지금... 사령관을 위해 싸우는 게, 더...

1000612165.english: - Undine had already come up to me.
1000612165.korean: - 운디네는 어느새 내 앞까지 다가와 있었다.

1000612166.english: - A bright red face and a trembling voice.

1000612167.english: - After thinking for a moment, I spoke to Undine, who had lowered her head.
1000612167.korean: - 잠시 고민하다 고개를 푹 숙인 운디네에게 말을 걸었다.

1000612168.english: - Undine's eyes widened as she thought about what it meant for a moment.
1000612168.korean: - 잠시 무슨뜻인지 생각해보던 운디네의 눈동자가 커졌다.

1000612169.english: Yeah! I'll give you the most delicious one! Look forward to it!
1000612169.korean: 응! 최고로 맛있는 걸로 맛보여줄게! 기대하라구!

1000612171.english: - The moment I tried to get up, my eyes started spinning.
1000612171.korean: - 몸을 일으키려는 순간 눈앞이 핑 돌았다.

1000612173.english: - In an instant, my legs gave out.

1000612174.english: - The body, out of control, slowly tilts.

1000612175.english: - As soon as the cold floor touched my face, I heard the sound of luggage falling and Undine's voice.
1000612175.korean: - 얼굴에 차가운 바닥이 닿음과 동시에 짐이 쏟아지는 소리와 운디네의 목소리가 들렸다.

1000612177.english: - I tried to get up somehow, but I had no strength in my arms or legs.
1000612177.korean: - 어떻게든 몸을 일으키려 했지만 팔다리에 전혀 힘이 들어가지 않았다.

1000612180.english: - As I was struggling to get up, feeling Undine's hand shaking my body, I heard other footsteps.
1000612180.korean: - 내 몸을 흔드는 운디네의 손길을 느끼며 일어나려고 발버둥 치던 중, 다른 발소리가 들렸다.

1000612183.english: - The sound of footsteps is getting closer.

1000612185.english: - Armand lifted my clothes. I felt a prickle in my arm.
1000612185.korean: - 아르망이 내 옷을 걷어올렸다. 이내 팔에 따끔한 통증이 느껴졌다.

1000612186.english: This is the sap prepared by Miss Daphne.

1000612187.english: You'll be fine for now, but you need to go back and recuperate right away.
1000612187.korean: 일단은 괜찮아지시겠지만, 바로 돌아가서 요양하셔야 합니다.

1000612188.english: Miss Undine, would you please help me lay His Majesty down?

1000612189.english: - My body was lifted with a rattling sound.
1000612189.korean: - 무언가 덜컥거리는 소리와 함께 몸이 붕 들렸다.

1000612190.english: - A stretcher... My body was laid on a cold cloth.

1000612191.english: Please bear with me for a moment. I will bring you to Orca shortly.

1000612192.english: - I barely regained consciousness enough to speak, perhaps due to the effects of the sap.
1000612192.korean: - 수액의 효과인지 간신히 목소리를 낼 만큼은 정신이 돌아왔다.

1000612193.english: - Undine flinched as I grabbed her hand that was wandering over my body, not knowing what to do.
1000612193.korean: - 어쩔 줄 모르고 내 몸 위를 헤매던 손을 잡자 운디네가 흠칫 몸을 떨었다.

1000612195.english: - At the same time as Undine's answer... drowsiness begins to creep in.
1000612195.korean: - 운디네의 대답과 동시에... 졸음이 몰려오기 시작한다.

1000612196.english: There's no need to hold out. Just sleep soundly.

1000612197.english: We will be by your side.

1000612198.english: - Armand's words completely relieved the tension.

1000612199.english: - Before I could answer, Suma came rushing over and closed my eyes.
1000612199.korean: - 대답을 하기도 전에 수마가 덮쳐와 눈을 감았다.

1000612200.english: - Just before I fell asleep, I thought I heard the sound of numerous engines and urgent radio transmissions.
1000612200.korean: - 잠에 들기 직전, 수많은 엔진소리와 다급한 무전이 들린 것 같았다.

1000612202.english: He's sleeping after receiving the IV. Fortunately, he's in good health...
1000612202.korean: 수액을 맞고 주무시고 계세요. 다행히 건강에 큰 이상은 없으시다고...

1000612204.english: Yes. They say he needs to recuperate for a while.

1000612205.english: Then, let's maintain an emergency combat posture for now.
1000612205.korean: 그럼 일단 비상 전투 태세는 유지하도록 하지.

1000612206.english: But I don't see Captain May. Wasn't she in Orca?
1000612206.korean: 그런데 메이 대장이 안보이는군. 오르카에 있지 않았었나?

1000612208.english: The captain is out first and is commanding the air defense.
1000612208.korean: 대장은 먼저 나가 상공 경계를 지휘하는 중입니다.

1000612209.english: He told me to pass on my message if I had anything to say.
1000612209.korean: 전할 게 있으면 제 편으로 전하라고 하시더군요.

1000612211.english: His face looked like it was about to cry at any moment.

1000612212.english: ...Okay. Go and stay by Captain May's side.

1000612214.english: Well then, I'll leave it at that...

1000612215.english: Other commanders also reported that they would carry out their respective missions.
1000612215.korean: 다른 지휘관들도 각자 맡은 임무를 수행하겠다고 전해왔습니다.

1000612216.english: According to the manual Your Majesty prepared in advance.

1000612218.english: Thank you so much. Thanks to you, my master is safe.

1000612219.english: No, I'm sure you were all prepared.

1000612220.english: I could only be a little more specific about the timing.
1000612220.korean: 저는 시기를 조금 더 특정할 수 있었을 뿐입니다.

1000612221.english: I think it would have been best to give first aid right away when he collapsed like that.
1000612221.korean: 그렇게 쓰러지셨을때 바로 응급처치를 하는게 최선이었다는 생각이 드는군.

1000612222.english: Even if I told you to rest, you would have just said okay and continued to push yourself too hard.
1000612222.korean: 쉬라고 말씀드려도 알았다고만 하시고 계속 무리하셨을 테니까.

1000612223.english: Yes, no matter what variable I put in, the same result comes out.
1000612223.korean: 그렇습니다. 어떤 변수를 넣어봐도 그런 결과만 나오더군요.

1000612224.english: I'm worried about what's to come. On top of my regular work, what will I do about the party?
1000612224.korean: 이제부터가 걱정이네요. 통상 업무에다, 또 파티는 어떻게 해야할지...

1000612225.english: His Majesty would not want to give up the party.
1000612225.korean: 폐하께선 파티를 포기하는 건 원하지 않으실겁니다.

1000612226.english: Hmm... Armand, when do you think His Majesty will feel better?
1000612226.korean: 흠... 아르망, 각하께선 언제쯤 괜찮아지실 것 같나?

1000612227.english: Based on Ms. Daphne's observations and my data, there are no problems with her current movements.
1000612227.korean: 다프네 양의 소견과 제 데이터로 보건대 지금도 거동하시는데는 문제 없으십니다.

1000612228.english: However, for the time being, you should avoid focusing on work and take a rest.
1000612228.korean: 다만, 당분간은 업무로 신경을 쓰는 것을 피하고 안정을 취하셔야합니다.

1000612229.english: Is that so... Constantia, didn't Labiata change her mind?
1000612229.korean: 그런가... 콘스탄챠, 라비아타는 생각을 바꾸지 않았나?

1000612230.english: Yes... My sister still thinks she shouldn't come forward.
1000612230.korean: 네... 언니는 아직 자신이 전면에 나서선 안된다고 생각하고 계세요.

1000612231.english: He said that he would step forward if something urgent came up, but for now, he wanted to leave the important things to us and help us from behind.
1000612231.korean: 긴급한 일이 생기면 나서시겠지만, &n지금은 중요한 건 저희에게 맡기고 뒤에서 돕고 싶다고 하셨어요.

1000612232.english: Although my sin of pointing my sword at Your Majesty was great, I believe my merit was greater than that...
1000612232.korean: 각하께 검을 들이댄 죄는 크지만, 그 이상으로 공을 세웠다고 생각하네만...

1000612233.english: If that's the case, then there's nothing I can do. For now... I can only be content with being released from the prison I created for myself.
1000612233.korean: 본인이 그렇다면 어쩔 수 없지. 지금으로서는... 그 스스로 만든 감옥에서 나온 것으로 만족할 수 밖에.

1000612234.english: Then, would it be okay for Labiata to help out in places where there is a shortage of workers?
1000612234.korean: 그러면 라비아타는 일손이 부족한 곳을 돕게 하는 걸로 괜찮겠나?

1000612236.english: Okay. I will command the unit and strengthen the security.
1000612236.korean: 좋아. 나는 부대를 지휘해 경계를 강화하지.

1000612237.english: I will leave your Majesty's nursing and internal affairs to you.

1000612239.english: Phew... I thought the sky was falling when my master collapsed.
1000612239.korean: 휴... 주인님이 쓰러지시다니, 하늘이 무너지는 줄 알았어요.

1000612240.korean: 다시 한 번 감사드려요, 아르망 님.

1000612242.english: First of all, I think His Majesty's vacation will go well.
1000612242.korean: 일단 폐하의 휴양 건은 잘 풀릴 것 같습니다.

1000612243.english: The Horde's reconnaissance report included the discovery of a natural hot spring.
1000612243.korean: 호드의 정찰보고에 자연온천을 발견했다는 내용이 있었습니다.

1000612244.english: Ah...! I'll let you rest there, Master.
1000612244.korean: 아...! 주인님을 거기서 쉬게 해드리면 되겠어요.

1000612245.english: Yes. The doctor is working to ensure that Your Majesty can remain for a while.
1000612245.korean: 네. 폐하께서 당분간 지내실 수 있도록 닥터가 작업을 진행중입니다.

1000612246.english: The doctor must be having a hard time... preparing for the party and all...
1000612246.korean: 닥터가 고생이 많겠어요... 파티 준비도 그렇고...

1000612247.english: Since Your Majesty will be unable to work, we will also be severely short-handed.
1000612247.korean: 폐하께서 일을 못하실테니, 저희도 일손이 많이 부족할 겁니다.

1000612248.english: It would be a good idea to ask other people for help too.
1000612248.korean: 다른 분들께도 도움을 요청하는 게 좋겠어요.

1000612249.english: I guess the only people I can ask for help are... Alexandra and Audrey...
1000612249.korean: 도움을 요청할 만할 분은... 알렉산드라 님이랑, 오드리 님 정도려나요...

1000612250.english: We also need someone to take care of the owner.

1000612251.english: Well... I'd like to take this opportunity to meet those who haven't had the chance to spend time with the Master before...
1000612251.korean: 음... 이 기회에 평소에 주인님과 함께 할 기회가 없으셨던 분들을...

1000612253.english: I know it's a bit embarrassing to say this, but I'm sure Your Majesty will be emotionally stable.
1000612253.korean: 이런 말을 하기엔 조금 그렇지만, 폐하께서 정서적으로도 안정 되실 겁니다.

1000612254.english: Haha, that's right. Given the circumstances, everyone will be dedicated.
1000612254.korean: 후훗, 그렇네요. 상황이 상황이니만큼 다들 헌신적이실테니까요.

1000612255.english: Then I will take charge of all internal operations.
1000612255.korean: 그럼 저는 내부 업무 전반을 맡겠습니다.

1000612256.english: Constance, please do your best to assist His Majesty.
1000612256.korean: 콘스탄챠 님은 폐하를 보필하는데에 최선을 다해주세요.

1000612258.english: - ...When I came to my senses, an unfamiliar ceiling came into view.

1000612259.english: - I guess they even paid attention to the ceiling when decorating the captain's quarters...
1000612259.korean: - 함장실을 꾸밀 때 천장까지도 신경썼나 보구나...

1000612260.english: - I slowly got up, thinking useless thoughts.
1000612260.korean: - 실없는 생각을 하며 천천히 몸을 일으켰다.

1000612261.english: - At my call, Undine, who was lying face down on the bed, lifted her head.
1000612261.korean: - 내 부름에 침대에 엎드려 있던 운디네가 부스스 얼굴을 들었다.

1000612264.english: - About 1/3 of the contents of the IV bottle hanging on the bedside table remain.

1000612265.english: - Let's turn our neck and shoulders. It's a little sore, but not so stiff that we can't move.
1000612265.korean: - 목과 어깨를 돌려보자 조금 뻐근하긴 해도 못 움직일 정도는 아니다.

1000612266.english: It's just my body. I need to rest for a while.

1000612267.english: - Daphne's voice remains faintly in my memory.

1000612268.english: Yeah... physical fatigue will go away quickly, but mental fatigue can only be cured by taking a break from work.
1000612268.korean: 응... 몸의 피로는 금방 낫지만, 정신적인 피로는 일에서 손 떼고 쉬는 것 밖에 방법이 없대.

1000612269.english: - From finishing up party preparations to... there's a mountain of work to do.
1000612269.korean: - 파티 준비 마무리부터 해서... 할 일이 산더미다.

1000612270.english: - Undine stopped me as I was trying to get out of bed.
1000612270.korean: - 이불을 치우고 일어나려는 나를 운디네가 막아세웠다.

1000612271.english: Until the end of today, I am the commander's escort, so for your safety, you must listen to me.
1000612271.korean: 오늘이 지나기 전까진 내가 사령관 호위니까, 안전을 위해서 사령관은 내 말을 들어야 해.

1000612272.english: ...And if the commander collapses while I'm escorting him...

1000612273.english: - I never thought about the guilt Undine must have felt.

1000612275.english: - I guess there's nothing I can do about it now...

1000612276.english: Oh, yeah. Okay. Just trust me!

1000612277.english: - As I lay back down on the bed, Undine put her hand on my head.
1000612277.korean: - 다시 침대에 몸을 눕히자 운디네가 내 머리에 손을 가져다 댔다.

1000612279.english: - Undine began to rub my head with a very serious expression.
1000612279.korean: - 운디네가 사뭇 진지한 표정으로 내 머리를 문지르기 시작했다.

1000612280.english: - I almost laughed, but Undine's touch was more effective than I thought.
1000612280.korean: - 웃음이 나올 뻔 했지만, 운디네의 손길은 생각보다 효과가 있었다.

1000612282.english: - I fell back into sleep listening to Undine's softly muttering voice.
1000612282.korean: - 작게 중얼거리는 운디네의 목소리를 들으며 다시 잠에 빠져들었다.

1000612283.english: - How long had I been asleep? When I opened my eyes, Undine was on the bed, snuggled up next to me, asleep.
1000612283.korean: - 얼마나 잠들어있었을까. 눈을 떠보니 운디네는 침대에 올라와 내 옆에 꼭 붙어 잠들어 있었다.

1000612284.english: - After laying me down comfortably and covering me with a blanket, I got out of bed.
1000612284.korean: - 편히 눕혀주고 이불까지 덮어준 후 침대에서 내려왔다.

1000612285.english: - I opened the door to the captain's cabin, stretching, and there was Armand.
1000612285.korean: - 기지개를 켜며 함장실 문을 열자 아르망이 있었다.

1000612287.english: - This is a familiar development, but...

1000612288.english: - The sight of Armand blocking my path brings back memories of the past.
1000612288.korean: - 내 앞을 막아선 아르망의 모습에 지난 기억이 떠오른다.

1000612289.english: - Unlike back then, the situation isn't as serious now...
1000612289.korean: - 그때와는 달리 지금은 심각한 상황은 아니지만...

1000612290.english: That's right. At that time, I had no choice but to step down.
1000612290.korean: 그렇네요. 그때는 저도 어쩔 수 없이 물러났었습니다.

1000612292.english: - Even though he is clearly smiling brightly, I feel a tremendous amount of pressure.
1000612292.korean: - 분명히 환하게 웃고 있는데도 엄청난 압박감이 느껴진다.

1000612293.english: Haa... I guess you're going to go back to work now that you're feeling a little better.
1000612293.korean: 하아... 조금 괜찮아지셨다고 또 일하러 가시려는 거겠죠.

1000612294.english: Your Majesty, please trust us and rest for a while. Everyone is worried.
1000612294.korean: 폐하, 저희들을 믿고 한동안 푹 쉬어주세요. 다들 걱정하고 있습니다.

1000612295.english: - As Armand said... the agents must have been very worried.

1000612296.english: - Thinking about that, I don't feel like being stubborn anymore.
1000612296.korean: - 그걸 생각하니 더이상 고집을 부릴 생각은 들지 않는다.

1000612297.english: - As I was about to go back to bed, Armand, who was standing in front of the door, came up to me.
1000612297.korean: - 다시 침대로 돌아가려는데 문 앞에 서있던 아르망이 곁으로 다가왔다.

1000612298.english: Wait a minute, Your Majesty. There is a separate place for you to rest.
1000612298.korean: 잠깐만요, 폐하. 쉬실 곳은 따로 있습니다.

1000612299.english: - I looked around the cozy room, not knowing what to do. Undine was still sleeping soundly.
1000612299.korean: - 영문을 모르겠어서 포근한 방을 둘러보았다. 운디네는 아직 새근새근 잘 자고있다.

1000612300.english: - Is there anywhere more convenient than here for our current situation?
1000612300.korean: - 지금 우리 형편에 여기보다 더 편한 곳이 있을까?

1000612301.english: The Horde's Feather Sheep discovered a hot spring on the outskirts of the city.
1000612301.korean: 호드의 페더 양이 도시 외곽에서 온천을 발견했습니다.

1000612302.english: All the surrounding insects have been eliminated, and the doctor is working to ensure that you can stay for the time being.
1000612302.korean: 주변 철충들은 전부 소탕했고, 당분간 묵으실 수 있도록 닥터가 작업중입니다.

1000612303.english: You will be able to rest comfortably by the time you arrive.
1000612303.korean: 도착하실 때 쯤이면 편히 쉬실 수 있을 거예요.

1000612304.english: The word "hot spring" made me feel involuntarily moved. But before that...
1000612304.korean: - 온천이라는 말에 나도 모르게 마음이 동했다. 하지만 그전에...

1000612305.english: After the party Your Majesty prepared, we will make it available for all members to use.
1000612305.korean: 폐하께서 준비하신 파티가 끝난 뒤에 대원들이 전부 이용할 수 있도록 하겠습니다.

1000612306.english: As I said before, Your Majesty is simple.

1000612307.english: - I packed my bags quickly, being careful not to wake Undine.
1000612307.korean: - 운디네를 깨우지 않도록 주의하며 간단히 짐을 챙겼다.

1000612308.english: - Armand, who had been waiting, opened his mouth with a smile.
1000612308.korean: - 기다리고 있던 아르망이 싱긋 웃으며 입을 열었다.

1000612309.english: Miss Undine... It seems like you were in a lot of pain, even if it was just for a little while.
1000612309.korean: 운디네 양... 잠깐이지만 마음 고생이 심했나보군요.

1000612310.english: Yes, I'll explain it clearly. And...

1000612311.english: Thank you for listening to me this time, Your Majesty.
1000612311.korean: 이번에는 제 말을 들어주셔서 감사합니다, 폐하.

1000612312.english: Haha, I had planned to call Miss Sowan, but I'm glad it ended up in my line.
1000612312.korean: 후후, 소완 양을 부르는 것까지 계획되어 있었는데, 제 선에서 끝나서 다행입니다.

1000612313.english: - You did a good job listening. I'd rather not drink that tea again.
1000612313.korean: - 말을 듣기를 잘했군. 또 그 차를 마시는 건 사양이다.

1000612314.english: We have selected the people who will serve His Majesty at the hot springs.

1000612315.english: The escort is ready, so let's go.

1000612316.english: - The hot spring that Feather discovered and the Doctor prepared was incredibly good.
1000612316.korean: - 페더가 발견하고 닥터가 준비해준 온천은 더할나위 없이 좋았다.

1000612317.english: - As I was completely relaxed and half asleep, submerged in the water, something cold touched my face.
1000612317.korean: - 완전히 긴장을 풀고 반쯤 잠든 상태로 몸을 물에 담그고 있을때, 얼굴에 무언가 차가운 것이 닿았다.

1000612318.english: If you stay like that, you'll get dizzy, right?

1000612319.english: - I looked up at Audrey, removing the cold towel from my face.
1000612319.korean: - 얼굴에 얹힌 차가운 물수건을 치우며 오드리를 올려다 보았다.

1000612320.english: That's right. The Commander is here, so there are things to take care of, and there are also various things to prepare for other people to use later.
1000612320.korean: 맞아요. 사령관이 여기 있으니까 챙길 것도 있고, &n또 나중에 다른 분들도 사용하려면 여러가지 준비해야 하니까요.

1000612321.english: - Audrey skillfully accepted the joke I made without realizing it, perhaps because the tension was relaxed.
1000612321.korean: - 긴장이 풀어진 탓인지 나도 모르게 던진 농담을 오드리는 능숙하게 받아쳤다.

1000612322.english: Oh my, I don't really like doing things in such an open place...
1000612322.korean: 어머, 저는 이렇게 개방적인 곳에서 하는 건 별로라...

1000612323.english: Later, just the two of us. Okay?

1000612324.english: - Audrey smiled back at my teasing.

1000612325.english: That too later. Right now I'm busy as the director here.
1000612325.korean: 그것도 나중에요. 지금은 이곳 감독으로 바쁘니까.

1000612326.english: - The sound of the crew moving busily can be heard from outside the cave.
1000612326.korean: - 동굴 바깥에서 대원들이 부산스럽게 움직이는 소리가 들려온다.

1000612327.english: - I was about to ask about the progress, but Armand's words came to mind and I stopped.
1000612327.korean: - 진행상황을 물어보려다 아르망의 말이 떠올라 그만두었다.

1000612328.english: Hahaha, we'll take care of it, Commander, just relax and get some rest.
1000612328.korean: 우후후, 저희가 알아서 할테니까, 사령관은 마음 놓고 푹 쉬도록 해요.

1000612330.english: - I heard that Valhalla is in the city...

1000612331.english: Well, due to circumstances, I have temporarily entrusted Khan with command of the sisters.
1000612331.korean: 사, 사정이 있어서 칸에게 임시로 자매들의 지휘권을 맡겼어.

1000612333.english: I'll be leading the Horde... haa... scouting the snowfields.
1000612333.korean: 호드를 지휘해서... 하아... 설원 정찰을 맡을거야.

1000612334.english: - It's not common for a commander to change, but...
1000612334.korean: - 지휘관이 바뀐다는 건 일반적인 일은 아니지만...

1000612335.english: - I decided to leave everything to the agents for the time being, and since I can trust both Khan and Leona, there shouldn't be any major problems.
1000612335.korean: - 당분간 대원들에게 전부 맡기기로 한데다, 칸과 레오나 둘 다 믿을 수 있으니 큰 문제는 없겠지.

1000612336.english: - There's just one thing I'm worried about...

1000612337.english: Don't bring that up. I don't want to think about it.
1000612337.korean: 그 이야기는 꺼내지 마. 가급적 생각하고 싶지 않으니까.

1000612338.english: - I couldn't help but laugh as I watched Leona pressing her temples as if she had a headache.
1000612338.korean: - 머리가 아프다는듯 관자놀이를 누르는 레오나를 보며 나도 모르게 웃음이 났다.

1000612339.english: He, and the people on this side will take turns nursing the commander.
1000612339.korean: 그, 그리고 이쪽에 있는 인원들이 돌아가며 사령관 옆에서 간호를 할 거야.

1000612340.english: Since you have no right to refuse... just obey and be served.
1000612340.korean: 거부권은 없으니까... 얌전히 시중을 받도록 해.

1000612341.english: - Audrey intervened as I laughed awkwardly.

1000612342.english: It'll help you relax too. Are you feeling okay?
1000612342.korean: 안정을 취하는데도 도움이 될 거예요. 몸은 괜찮죠?

1000612343.english: I'll say it again. This time, you have to be quiet, Commander.
1000612343.korean: 다시 한번 말하지만. 이번엔 얌전히 있어야 해 사령관.

1000612345.english: Then I should go to work too. Oh, before that.
1000612345.korean: 그럼 저도 일하러 가보죠. 아, 그 전에.

1000612346.english: By the way, it's my turn last.

1000612347.english: - Audrey smiled with satisfaction as if she had heard the answer she wanted and disappeared.
1000612347.korean: - 원하는 대답을 들었다는 듯 오드리는 만족스럽게 웃으며 사라졌다.

1000612348.english: [c][57e137]After a while, a temporary shelter was set up near the cave[-][/c]

1000612349.english: - After taking a bath, I went into the accommodations nearby.
1000612349.korean: - 목욕을 마치고 근처에 마련된 숙소로 들어왔다.

1000612350.english: - I thanked the team members who had prepared in a hurry and walked towards the inner bedroom.
1000612350.korean: - 급하게 준비했을 대원들에게 감사하며 안쪽의 침실로 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000612351.english: - As I open the door, a simple but neat bedroom comes into view.
1000612351.korean: - 문을열자 간소하지만 깔끔한 침실이 눈에 들어온다.

1000612353.english: - The middle of the blanket covering the bed is bulging.
1000612353.korean: - 침대에 덮힌 이불의 한가운데가 볼록 솟아있다.

1000612354.english: - I slowly pulled back the blanket, preparing myself mentally so as not to be surprised.
1000612354.korean: - 놀라지 않도록 마음의 준비를 하며 천천히 이불을 걷었다.

1000612357.english: I was... warming up the bed... hehe...

1000612358.english: - As Portia said, I feel a warm heat under the blanket.
1000612358.korean: - 포티아의 말대로 이불 속에서 후끈한 열기가 느껴진다.

1000612359.english: - I don't know how I would have felt normally, but after hearing the story from Leona and Audrey, I went to bed without much thought.
1000612359.korean: - 평소라면 어땠을지 모르겠지만, &n레오나와 오드리에게 이야기를 듣고 난 뒤라서 그런지 별다른 고민없이 침대로 들어갔다.

1000612361.english: It's a different feeling than soaking in a hot spring. Plus...
1000612361.korean: - 온천에 몸을 담갔을 때와는 또다른 느낌. 거기다...

1000612363.english: - Ah... a soft sensation envelops my body.

1000612366.english: - While I was enjoying the comfort of my thick blanket, Portia began to speak hesitantly.
1000612366.korean: - 내가 두꺼운 이불 속에서 안락함을 만끽하고 있자 포티아가 우물쭈물 말을 꺼냈다.

1000612367.english: Uh, uh... Just like Alexandra taught me... uh, sleep comfortably...
1000612367.korean: 저, 저기... 알렉산드라 님께 배운대로... 펴, 편안한 잠자리를...

1000612368.english: - Portia's body shook uneasily as she got up.
1000612368.korean: - 몸을 일으키는 포티아의 몸이 불안하게 흔들렸다.

1000612369.english: - I stopped Portia for a moment and looked at her face intently.
1000612369.korean: - 포티아를 잠시 제지하고 얼굴을 가만히 들여다 보았다.

1000612370.english: Portia's eyelids fluttered. Her blank eyes looked up at me and slowly closed.
1000612370.korean: - 포티아의 눈꺼풀이 파르르 떨리고 있다. 멍한 눈동자가 나를 올려다보다 천천히 감겼다.

1000612373.english: - Watching Portia try to comfort me even though she was exhausted... I felt something.
1000612373.korean: - 피곤에 찌든 채로도 날 위로하려는 포티아의 모습을 보며... 느껴지는 것이 있었다.

1000612375.english: - He held Portia tightly so she couldn't move.

1000612376.english: Portia, who had been frozen for a moment, slowly relaxed. Soon, even breathing was heard.
1000612376.korean: - 순간 굳어졌던 포티아가 천천히 긴장을 풀었다. 얼마 지나지 않아 고른 숨소리가 들려왔다.

1000612378.english: - Portia snuggled into his arms, snoring.

1000612379.english: - In Portia's soft and warm embrace, I too slowly fell asleep.
1000612379.korean: - 그런 포티아의 부드럽고 따뜻한 품에서 나도 천천히 잠에 빠져들었다.

1000612380.english: As you may have heard, our sisters are in charge of the inner city.
1000612380.korean: 들었겠지만, 우리 자매들이 도시 내부를 맡고 있어.

1000612381.english: And the steel line forms a wide defensive line centered around the commander's location.
1000612381.korean: 그리고 스틸라인은 사령관이 있는 곳을 중심으로 넓게 방어선을 형성하고 있고.

1000612384.english: Oh... Was there a picture taken with me?
1000612384.korean: 오호... 나랑 같이 찍힌 것도 있었나?

1000612385.english: Your Horde, and my area of ​​responsibility is the space between the Steel Line and Valhalla lines.
1000612385.korean: 너희 호드, 그리고 내가 담당할 구역은 스틸라인과 발할라의 전선 사이 공간이야.

1000612386.english: Since we have fewer personnel than the area we're in charge of, we're implementing a mobile defense based on Talon Feather's reconnaissance results...
1000612386.korean: 담당한 구역에 비해 인원이 적으니까, 탈론페더의 정찰결과를 바탕으로 기동방어를 실시...

1000612387.english: I don't know! And I wouldn't even look at that if you gave me a mountain of canned tuna.
1000612387.korean: 몰라! 그리고 그것만은 참치캔을 산더미만큼 준대도 안 볼거야.

1000612388.english: Really? I'd like to have it as a souvenir.

1000612389.english: ...I'm in the middle of a briefing. Stop whispering and focus.

1000612391.english: Captain Leona, you don't care? Commander's photo.
1000612391.korean: 레오나 대장은 관심 없어? 사령관 사진.

1000612393.english: I'm not interested in that kind of thing.

1000612395.english: Okay. Then let's just keep it between us.

1000612396.english: Sigh... Do you know how ridiculous what you're doing is?
1000612396.korean: 하아... 너희가 하는 게 얼마나 말도 안되는 짓인 줄 알아?

1000612397.english: It's a good thing the commander is so stupidly kind...

1000612398.english: Hey, we're keeping the line too. Don't worry.
1000612398.korean: 에이, 우리도 선은 지키고 있다고. 걱정하지 마.

1000612399.english: No, no, Captain Leona. Did you know?

1000612401.english: Your staff is spying on the commander?
1000612401.korean: 너희 참모가 사령관을 몰래 훔쳐보는 거?

1000612402.english: Or is it playing with your hands every night?

1000612404.english: I've finished reconnaissance. I'll send you the results.

1000612405.english: Thank you for your hard work. I'll build on that. Just wait a moment.
1000612405.korean: 수고했어. 그걸 바탕으로 움직일거야. 잠깐만 기다려.

1000612407.english: I should check the photos I took... Oh my, Werewolf? Why are you smiling like that?
1000612407.korean: 사진 찍은 거 확인해보고 있어야겠다... 어머, 워울프? 왜 그렇게 웃고 있어요?

1000612411.english: For my colleague's sake, can I ask you a favor?
1000612411.korean: 제 동료를 위해서, 부탁 하나만 드려도 될까요...

1000612413.english: Please help me... so that Feather can live forever without knowing that Captain Khan knows...
1000612413.korean: 칸 대장님이 알고 계신다는 걸... 페더가 영원히 모르고 살도록... 도와주세요...

1000612414.english: He's an idiot and a delusional pervert, but... he's a guy who definitely does his job...
1000612414.korean: 멍청이에다가 망상변태지만... 자기 일은 확실히 하는 녀석이니까...

1000612415.english: We can't let this become a genetic seed...
1000612415.korean: 유전자 씨앗이 되도록 내버려둘 수는 없어요...

1000612416.english: Haa... This is truly a tear-jerking comradeship.

1000612417.english: Once I successfully complete this mission, I'll think about it.
1000612417.korean: 일단 이번 임무를 무사히 마무리하면, 생각해볼게.

1000612418.english: Yes, yes! I'll do my best!

1000612420.english: So, I'm going to give you some instructions for the mission now...
1000612420.korean: 그럼 이제부터 임무를 위해서 지시를 하달할까 하는데...

1000612422.english: Oh my, where did they all go...!

1000612424.english: Where did Feather go again... He's just hanging out in the corner again!
1000612424.korean: 페더 얘는 또 어디갔... 이거 또 구석에서 헤벌쭉하고있네!

1000612425.english: I can't live because of you, really!

1000612426.english: I think I understand why Khan cares about his subordinates.
1000612426.korean: 칸이 부하들을 아끼는 이유를 알 것 같네.

1000612428.english: You guys didn't need a detailed plan?

1000612429.english: Of course. We share all our thoughts and feelings with Captain Khan!
1000612429.korean: 당연하지. 우리는 칸 대장을 통해 모든 생각과 모든 감정을 함께 나누니까!

1000612430.english: What are you talking about? We're not even AGS.

1000612431.english: Oh, but... it's true that Captain Khan is the center of our tactics.
1000612431.korean: 아, 그래도... 저희 전술의 중심이 칸 대장님인건 맞아요.

1000612432.english: This was my first time conducting an operation without Captain Khan present, so I was a little worried...
1000612432.korean: 칸 대장님이 안 계신 상태로 작전을 하는 건 처음이라 조금 걱정했었는데...

1000612433.english: Captain Leona's command is truly remarkable. I hardly felt Captain Khan's absence.
1000612433.korean: 레오나 대장님의 지휘는 역시 대단해요. 칸 대장님의 부재를 거의 못 느꼈어요.

1000612434.english: Huh, enough of the formalities. It just worked out well because there were only weak enemies here.
1000612434.korean: 흥, 인사치레는 됐어. 이곳엔 약한 적들밖에 없어서 잘 풀렸을 뿐이야.

1000612437.english: Let's go back when it's finished.

1000612440.english: Why are there so many shy people in Orca? Just asking them to sleep together would be enough.
1000612440.korean: 오르카엔 부끄럼쟁이가 왜 이렇게 많은거야? 그냥 같이 자자고 한 마디면 될텐데.

1000612441.english: The commander will not be absent unless it is a matter of time and place.
1000612441.korean: 사령관은 때와 장소만 가리면 어지간해선 빼지 않으니까.

1000612443.english: You idiot. Do you think everyone is single-celled like you?

1000612444.english: ...Well, still... seeing as you came here and handed over command to Captain Khan...
1000612444.korean: ...뭐 그래도... 굳이 칸 대장님한테 지휘권까지 넘기면서 여기로 오신 걸 보면...

1000612446.english: It must be hot because it's been holding on for so long, right?

1000612451.english: Right! I just took a picture of you returning to your accommodations. Wow, you look so cool!
1000612451.korean: 그쵸! 조금 전에 숙소로 돌아가시는 걸 찍었어요. 꺄아, 너무 멋있으셔!

1000612453.english: Oh, hello. Are you going to take a bath?

1000612455.english: Yes... It's not a common opportunity. I won't be able to use it for long, though...
1000612455.korean: 네... 흔한 기회가 아니니까요. 오래 쓰진 못하겠지만...

1000612456.english: It is dangerous to stay in one place for too long, but His Majesty will try to stay here longer, even if it means going to great lengths.
1000612456.korean: 한 곳에 오래 머물러 있는 건 위험하지만, &n폐하께선 조금 무리해서라도 이 근처에 더 있으려고 하실 거예요.

1000612457.english: In the meantime... you can use the facilities here and in the city.
1000612457.korean: 그러는 동안은... 이곳과 도시의 시설들을 이용할 수 있겠죠.

1000612460.english: Yes, your physical condition has improved.

1000612461.english: You woke up early this morning too... um...

1000612462.english: Anyway, don't worry, I'm resting comfortably.
1000612462.korean: 여하튼 편히 쉬고 계시니까 걱정 마세요.

1000612466.english: Commander... I haven't recovered for long... But if I miss this opportunity...
1000612466.korean: 사령관... 회복된 지 얼마 안됐는데... 그래도 이 기회를 놓치면...

1000612467.english: Yeah, you said you needed some stability. Just let me rest in your arms.
1000612467.korean: 그래, 안정이 필요하댔지. 내 품에서 쉬게 해주면 될거야.

1000612468.english: Ah, no... using something like that... is a bit...
1000612468.korean: 아, 아니... 그런 걸 이용하는 건... 조금...

1000612469.english: Ugh... I should've just brought some wine... Oh, no. I just wanted to hug you sober at first...
1000612469.korean: 윽... 그냥 와인을 챙겨올 걸... 아, 아냐. 처음엔 맨 정신으로 안기고 싶으니까...

1000612471.english: This will be a memorable day for Leona.

1000612473.english: It would be best if no one were allowed into His Majesty's room until tomorrow morning.
1000612473.korean: 내일 아침까지는 폐하의 방에 아무도 들이지 않는 게 좋겠습니다.

1000612475.english: - I walked down the hallway, which was quieter than usual, and headed to the captain's cabin.
1000612475.korean: - 평소보다 한산한 복도를 걸으며 함장실로 향했다.

1000612476.english: Oh my, it seems like you're walking faster and faster.
1000612476.korean: 어머, 점점 걸음이 빨라지시는 것 같은데요?

1000612477.english: It's hard to keep up, so walk a little slower.

1000612478.english: - Audrey smiled knowingly and linked arms with me.
1000612478.korean: - 오드리는 다 안다는듯이 웃으며 나에게 팔짱을 꼈다.

1000612479.english: - Finally, when we arrived at the captain's cabin, Audrey grabbed my hand as I was trying to turn on the light.
1000612479.korean: - 마침내 함장실에 도착해 조명을 켜려는 내 손을 오드리가 붙잡았다.

1000612480.english: I've seen it a lot before, so for now, just like this...
1000612480.korean: 보는 건 아까 많이 봤으니까, 지금은 그냥 이렇게...

1000612481.english: Audrey's arms wrapped around my neck. But then I felt like I heard something...?
1000612481.korean: - 오드리의 두 팔이 내 목에 감겼다. 그런데 무슨 소리가 들린 것 같은 느낌이...?

1000612483.english: I can only hear your voice.

1000612484.english: - I no longer had the luxury of thinking about anything else because of the voice whispering in my ear.
1000612484.korean: - 귓가에 속삭이는 목소리에 나도 더이상 다른 것을 생각할 여유가 없어졌다.

1000612486.english: - I heard the sound of Audrey's feet touching the sofa as she backed away, as if tempting me.
1000612486.korean: - 나를 유혹하듯 뒷걸음질치던 오드리의 발끝이 소파에 닿는 소리가 났다.

1000612487.english: - I also bent down, following Audrey as she sat down slowly.
1000612487.korean: - 천천히 앉는 오드리를 따라 나도 몸을 숙였다.

1000612488.english: Oh my, this sofa... it's so soft and squishy.
1000612488.korean: 어머, 이 소파... 굉장히 부드럽고 말랑말랑하네요.

1000612490.english: Ooh, hoo hoo... Stop doing that and focus on me.
1000612490.korean: 우, 우후후... 자꾸 그러지 말고, 나한테 집중해요.

1000612491.english: Wow... Oh my, it's already so sticky...

1000612494.english: Sigh... I can't pretend not to know any longer.
1000612494.korean: 하아... 더이상 모른 척 할 수는 없겠네요.

1000612495.english: To the person below, I'm sorry for sitting on you.
1000612495.korean: 아래에 계신 분. 깔고 앉아서 미안해요.

1000612496.english: - The lights come on, and we see Audrey's arms and legs writhing beneath her as she sighs.
1000612496.korean: - 조명이 들어오고, 한숨을 내쉬는 오드리 밑에서 바둥거리는 팔다리가 보인다.

1000612501.english: - From the outfit... to the messy cheesecake...

1000612502.english: I thought it was someone, but it was Undine.

1000612505.english: - Audrey sighed softly at Undine's words and returned to her usual cool expression.
1000612505.korean: - 운디네의 말에 작게 한숨을 쉰 오드리가 다시 평소처럼 시원한 표정을 지었다.

1000612506.english: It's true that I've been interrupted, but that's okay. There will always be opportunities in the future.
1000612506.korean: 방해 받은 건 사실이지만, 괜찮아요. 기회는 앞으로도 얼마든지 있으니까.

1000612507.english: By the way... can you explain what happened?
1000612507.korean: 그나저나... 대체 어떻게 된 일인지 설명해주겠어요?

1000612508.english: That, that... I was waiting to eat cheesecake with the Commander...
1000612508.korean: 그, 그게... 사령관이랑 같이 치즈케익을 먹으려고 기다리다가...

1000612509.english: I'm hungry, I just wanted to taste a little bit...
1000612509.korean: 배, 배가 고파서 조금 맛만 보려는데...

1000612510.english: - I remembered the promise I made before I collapsed.
1000612510.korean: - 내가 쓰러지기 전에 했던 약속이 떠올랐다.

1000612511.english: - We should have rescheduled our appointment after Undine returned to her regular duties...
1000612511.korean: - 운디네가 통상임무로 돌아가고 나서 다시 약속을 잡았어야 했는데...

1000612512.english: Uh, uh, no. I just wanted to surprise the Commander...
1000612512.korean: 으응, 아, 아냐. 그냥 사령관을 깜짝 놀래켜주고 싶어서 그런거니까...

1000612513.english: I ended up sitting on it. It was so sticky.
1000612513.korean: 그 위에 제가 앉아버린거군요. 어째 끈적끈적하다 했어요.

1000612515.english: It's okay. It's funny to do more in this mood... I can go and fix it now.
1000612515.korean: 괜찮아요. 이런 무드에서 더 하는것도 웃기고... 지금 가서 수선하면 돼요.

1000612516.english: Shall we go together? I'll repair Undine's too.

1000612518.english: - Undine is hesitating as if she is very sorry.

1000612520.english: Are you serious? I'm sure there's time, but...

1000612521.english: Haha, that doesn't seem like a lot of free time for a commander, right?
1000612521.korean: 후후, 사령관 기준으로는 그렇게 여유있는 시간은 아닐텐데요?

1000612522.english: And when you think about it, our cute Undine is there too...
1000612522.korean: 거기다 우리 귀여운 운디네도 있다는 걸 생각하면...

1000612523.english: - Undine approached me as I was scratching my head in embarrassment.
1000612523.korean: - 민망해서 머리를 긁적이는 내게 운디네가 다가왔다.

1000612524.english: - Undine, who had been looking up at me with a blushing face without saying a word, carefully opened her mouth.
1000612524.korean: - 말없이 얼굴을 붉히며 나를 올려다보던 운디네가 조심스럽게 입을 열었다.

1000612525.english: Rice, I don't really like the commander, no...!
1000612525.korean: 벼, 별로 사령관을 좋아하는 건 아, 아니니까아...!

1000612526.english: - I was dumbfounded by the unexpected words.

1000612527.english: - Audrey is also looking at Undine with wide eyes, as if she is the same as me.
1000612527.korean: - 오드리도 나와 마찬가지인지 눈이 동그래진채 운디네를 보고있다.

1000612528.english: Undine, what the hell is that?

1000612529.english: Yes? I said it was a way to seduce men...
1000612529.korean: 네? 나, 남성을 유혹하는 방법이라고 해서...

1000612530.english: - And now that I think about it, it was definitely Sirene last time...

1000612531.english: - You shouldn't laugh... If you laugh...

1000612533.english: Okay, I didn't prepare this specifically for you, Commander, but... Come on, I'll give you a taste!
1000612533.korean: 따, 딱히 사령관을 위해 준비한 건 아, 아니지만. 자, 맛 보게 해줄게!

1000612535.english: - I barely managed to suppress my laughter and turned my gaze. Audrey was also holding back her laughter.
1000612535.korean: - 간신히 웃음을 삼키며 시선을 돌리자 오드리도 웃음을 참고 있다.

1000612537.english: - Audrey wiped away the tears forming at the corners of her eyes and sighed happily.
1000612537.korean: - 눈꼬리에 맺힌 눈물을 찍어낸 오드리가 기분좋게 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000612538.english: Commander? The Lady is doing this, and you're going to just sit back and do nothing?
1000612538.korean: 사령관? 레이디가 이렇게까지 하는데, 가만히 있을 건가요?

1000612539.english: Okay, I'll give you the order. This is my thanks for the cheesecake I gave you last time.
1000612539.korean: 자, 순서는 양보할게요. 저번에 준 치즈케익의 보답이에요.

1000612540.english: ...Oh my? Why is there a hole here...

1000612542.english: It's been a while since the three of us... Ahhh?!

1000612544.english: Will you stop using our sisters to deal with the Metal Parasites?
1000612544.korean: 자꾸 우리 자매들을 이용해서 철충들을 처리하는 건 그만둬주겠어?

1000612545.english: Valhalla has a stable unit composition, so isn't it advantageous for forming a front line and fighting?
1000612545.korean: 발할라는 부대 구성이 안정되어있어서 전선을 형성하고 싸우는데 유리하지 않나.

1000612546.english: We drive, you catch. It's a very reasonable tactic.
1000612546.korean: 우리가 몰고, 너희가 잡는다. 아주 합리적인 전술이지.

1000612547.english: Didn't you say something wrong about us having an accident and us having to deal with it?
1000612547.korean: 너희가 사고치고, 우리가 수습하는 걸 잘못말한 거 아냐?

1000612548.english: I guess you could see it that way.

1000612549.english: Sigh... Do you resemble your unit members, or are your unit members becoming more like you?
1000612549.korean: 하아... 네가 부대원들을 닮은 거야, 아니면 부대원들이 널 닮아가는 거야?

1000612550.english: It's really amazing that no one knows that the famous Khan Commander is actually this shameless...
1000612550.korean: 그 이름높은 칸 대장이 사실은 이렇게 뻔뻔하다는 걸 다들 모른다는게 정말...

1000612551.english: I have no intention of hiding anything. It's your freedom to expose it.
1000612551.korean: 딱히 숨길 생각은 없다. 폭로하는 건 네 자유지.

1000612552.english: What's the point of talking about something like that?

1000612553.english: Yes, if we go to a war of exposure, neither side will benefit.
1000612553.korean: 그래, 폭로전으로 가면 서로에게 득이될 게 없다.

1000612554.english: Well, wouldn't it be nice to have someone you can open up to?
1000612554.korean: 뭐, 마음을 터놓고 이야기할 만한 상대가 하나쯤 있다는 건 좋은 일 아니겠나.

1000612555.english: No matter how much the commander cares for us, there are things that are difficult to say.
1000612555.korean: 아무리 사령관이 우릴 아껴준다고 해도, 쉽사리 말할 수 없는 일도 있는 법이니까.

1000612556.english: The same goes for the unit members.

1000612557.english: ...That's true. Especially for commanders like us.

1000612558.english: Yes, because you and I are the same commander.

1000612559.english: It's almost time. Let's get back to work. Have you selected the guards?
1000612559.korean: 슬슬 시간이 됐군. 일 얘기로 돌아가지. 경계 인원은 선별했나?

1000612560.english: Of course. It was hard to choose because all the sisters volunteered.
1000612560.korean: 당연하지. 자매들이 너도나도 자원하는 바람에 뽑는데 애먹었어.

1000612561.english: What about you guys? I thought you'd be the only one feeling down about being on the edge?
1000612561.korean: 그러는 너희는? 나는 또 네가 혼자 경계선다고 궁상떨 줄 알았는데?

1000612562.english: If the unit members leave it to themselves and don't attend the party...
1000612562.korean: 부대원들이 자기들한테 맡기고 파티에 참석하지 않으면...

1000612563.english: He threatened to throw me into the commander's room wearing only my underwear.
1000612563.korean: 속옷만 입히고 사령관 방에 밀어넣을 거라고 으름장을 놓더군.

1000612564.english: That looks really nice. Why didn't you just do that?
1000612564.korean: 아주 보기좋네. 그냥 그렇게 하지 그랬어?

1000612565.english: Don't you know that's not my taste?
1000612565.korean: 내 취향은 그게 아니란 거 알지 않나?

1000612566.english: Huh, you might regret it then.

1000612567.english: It's okay if it's a little late, right? There's still plenty of time ahead of us anyway.
1000612567.korean: 조금 늦어지더라도 괜찮지 않은가. 어차피 앞으로 시간은 많은데.

1000612569.english: Still, it's not good for the captains to be too late.
1000612569.korean: 그래도 대장들이 너무 늦어지는 건 좋지 않아.

1000612570.english: No matter how much we tell them it's okay, the soldiers can't ignore us.
1000612570.korean: 아무리 괜찮다고 말해줘도, 부대원들은 우리 눈치를 안 볼 수가 없으니까.

1000612572.english: But is that the only reason you went to the commander's bedroom? For your subordinates?
1000612572.korean: 그런데, 그게 사령관의 침실로 간 이유의 전부인가? 부하들을 위해서?

1000612574.english: That can't be true. I want the Commander too, and the Commander... is definitely... motivated...
1000612574.korean: 그럴리 없잖아. 나도 사령관을 원하고, 사, 사령관도... 분명... 의욕적으로...

1000612575.english: Yes, the Commander would prefer it if you spoke so frankly.
1000612575.korean: 그래. 사령관은 그렇게 솔직하게 말하는 걸 더 좋아할거다.

1000612576.english: Wow, you're quite the love guru.

1000612577.english: I'll go first. Clear the way for the commander to pass.
1000612577.korean: 난 먼저 가 있을게. 사령관이 지날 길이나 미리 확보해 줘.

1000612578.english: Okay, I'll see you at the party.

1000612579.english: - I stopped by the bridge for a moment while Audrey and Undine prepared.
1000612579.korean: - 오드리와 운디네가 준비하는동안 잠시 함교에 들렀다.

1000612580.english: - I habitually turned on the panel and glanced through it...

1000612581.english: - Except for the parts that I have to touch due to the chain of command, the work is being done perfectly.
1000612581.korean: - 명령체계상 어쩔 수 없이 내가 손을 대야 하는 부분을 제외하곤 업무는 완벽하게 처리되어 있다.

1000612582.english: - Plus, detailed guidelines that ensure no additional work is needed for the time being...
1000612582.korean: - 거기에 더해 당분간은 추가적인 작업이 필요 없을 정도로 세세한 가이드라인까지...

1000612583.english: - I turned around, feeling my chest warm, and found a familiar silhouette in the corner.
1000612583.korean: - 가슴속이 따뜻해지는 것을 느끼며 몸을 돌리다, 구석에서 익숙한 실루엣을 발견했다.

1000612584.english: - I approached and lifted up a pink box with a heart drawn on it, and as expected...
1000612584.korean: - 다가가서 하트가 그려진 분홍빛 상자를 번쩍 들어올리자 예상대로...

1000612586.english: - I peeked at the screen and saw myself examining the command panel.
1000612586.korean: - 슬쩍 훔쳐보니 화면에는 지휘패널을 살펴보는 내 모습이 떠올라 있다.

1000612587.english: - When I silently held out my hand, Feather handed me the panel with a sullen look.
1000612587.korean: - 내가 말없이 손을 내밀자 페더가 시무룩하게 패널을 건네주었다.

1000612588.english: - As expected. I flipped through the list and saw that it contained a complete picture of my bedroom over the past few days.
1000612588.korean: - 아니나 다를까. 목록을 넘겨보자 이 며칠간의 내 침실이 고스란히 찍혀 있었다.

1000612589.english: - Feather trembled as he erased each photo without hesitation.
1000612589.korean: - 망설임없이 하나씩 사진을 지워나갈때마다 페더는 움찔움찔 몸을 떨었다.

1000612592.english: - A question mark appeared above Feather's head as he accepted the panel I handed him.
1000612592.korean: - 내가 건넨 패널을 받아든 페더의 머리 위에 물음표가 떠올랐다.

1000612594.english: - I deleted about half of it.

1000612595.english: - I left the normal photos, except for the ones I couldn't show to the children.
1000612595.korean: - 아이들에게 보여줄 수 없는 것을 제외한, 평범한 사진은 남겨두었다.

1000612596.english: - A photo of me putting a coat on Portia, and a photo of Alexandra smiling at Portia.
1000612596.korean: - 내가 포티아에게 외투를 입혀주는 사진, 그런 포티아를 보고 미소짓는 알렉산드라의 사진.

1000612597.english: - And a picture of me holding hands with Miho and walking through the snow, a picture of me smiling at Undine, who is delighted to be wearing luxurious clothes...
1000612597.korean: - 그리고 미호와 손을 잡고 눈속을 걷는 사진, 고급스러운 옷을 들고 기뻐하는 운디네를 보며 웃는 내 사진...

1000612598.english: - He continued speaking while looking at Feather, who was just blinking his eyes.
1000612598.korean: - 눈만 깜빡거리는 페더를 보며 말을 이었다.

1000612600.english: - As I said that, a few faces that I thought I might like came to mind, but I tried to push those thoughts to the side.
1000612600.korean: - 그렇게 말하면서도 오히려 좋아할 것 같은 몇몇 얼굴이 떠올랐지만 애써 그런 생각을 구석으로 밀어 넣었다.

1000612601.english: - I remembered what Feather said last time.

1000612602.english: - Capture precious things and happy times in photos...
1000612602.korean: - 소중한 것들과 행복한 시간을 사진으로 남긴다...

1000612603.english: - I definitely looked happy when I was with my loved ones.
1000612603.korean: - 소중한 사람들과 같이 있는 내 모습은 틀림없이 행복해 보였다.

1000612605.english: Haha, I got it. I'll definitely take a picture of your surprised face.
1000612605.korean: 후후, 알았어요. 깜짝 놀라는 모습, 반드시 찍을게요.

1000612606.english: - Feather's words brought back forgotten worries.
1000612606.korean: - 페더의 말에 잊고있던 걱정이 다시 떠올랐다.

1000612607.english: - Of course, the doctor would have taken care of everything...
1000612607.korean: - 물론 닥터가 알아서 잘 진행해 줬겠지만...

1000612609.english: - Feather, who was about to turn his body, suddenly stopped moving.
1000612609.korean: - 몸을 돌리려던 페더가 문득 움직임을 멈췄다.

1000612610.english: Commander, it's okay, but you said it was rude to the other person who was being filmed, right?
1000612610.korean: 사령관님은 괜찮으시지만, 찍히는 다른 분께 실례라고 하셨죠?

1000612611.english: - Feather's face brightened as he answered, suppressing the ominous feeling that was slowly rising.
1000612611.korean: - 스멀스멀 피어오르는 불길한 예감을 억누르며 대답하자 페더의 얼굴이 환해졌다.

1000612612.english: Then how about taking a picture of me and the Commander?
1000612612.korean: 그럼 저랑 사령관님을 찍는 건 어때요?

1000612613.english: I like that kind of thing... Hehe, hehehe...

1000612614.english: Yeah, if I do it myself... hehe... the angle is a bit more free... ahh?!
1000612614.korean: 그래, 내가 직접 하면... 후후... 앵글을 좀 더 자유롭게... 아앗?!

1000612617.english: - I sent Feather first and entered the city's shopping mall area with Audrey and Undine.
1000612617.korean: - 페더를 먼저 보내고 오드리, 운디네와 함께 도시의 쇼핑몰 구역에 들어섰다.

1000612620.english: - The shopping mall is decked out in festive decorations, as if something happened while I was resting.
1000612620.korean: - 내가 쉬는 사이에 무슨 일이 있었던 건지 쇼핑몰은 축제 장식으로 꾸며져 있다.

1000612622.english: Hohoho, Undine. You're really clinging to the Commander.
1000612622.korean: 우후후, 운디네. 사령관에게 아주 찰싹 달라붙어 있군요.

1000612623.english: - Undine held my hand tightly without saying a word.
1000612623.korean: - 운디네는 말없이 내 손을 꼭 잡았다.

1000612624.english: - And Audrey, standing on the other side, wrapped her arm around me and pressed our bodies closer together.
1000612624.korean: - 그리고 반대편에 선 오드리도 내 팔을 감으며 몸을 더욱 바싹 붙혔다.

1000612625.english: Ahh... It was a long-awaited party, but I didn't have time to fix my costume.
1000612625.korean: 아아... 모처럼의 파티인데, 결국 의상을 수선할 시간은 없었네요.

1000612626.english: Because someone held on to me until I was on the edge and wouldn't let go...
1000612626.korean: 누가 아슬아슬할 때까지 붙잡고 안놔주는 바람에...

1000612627.english: Your Majesty, the party preparations are complete.

1000612628.english: All Orca members, except for a few border guards, are gathered here.
1000612628.korean: 소수 경계인원을 제외한 오르카 대원 전부가 모여 있습니다.

1000612629.english: Most people are confused, but they seem to have some idea after seeing the decorations.
1000612629.korean: 대부분 어리둥절해하고 있지만, 장식을 보고 어느정도 눈치는 챈 모양입니다.

1000612630.english: There is no one else who can prepare something like this for us but Your Majesty.
1000612630.korean: 저희에게 이런 걸 준비해주실 분은 폐하밖에 없으니까요.

1000612631.english: That's right. Just a little more and you'll all notice!
1000612631.korean: 맞아. 조금만 더 지나면 전부 눈치 챌거야!

1000612633.english: - I followed Undine, who was pulling my hand, to the center of the shopping mall.
1000612633.korean: - 내 손을 잡아끄는 운디네를 따라 쇼핑몰의 중심으로 향했다.

1000612634.english: - The soldiers gathered in the large square began to cheer when they saw me.
1000612634.korean: - 넓은 광장에 모여있던 대원들이 나를 보고 환호하기 시작했다.

1000612636.english: Thank you for your hard work, Commander.

1000612637.english: Your Majesty, thank you for your hard work.

1000612638.english: I'm speaking on behalf of the team, but the members are also very happy.
1000612638.korean: 제가 대표로 말씀드리지만, 대원들도 정말 기뻐하고 있습니다.

1000612639.english: Wow, that's quite something. I didn't know you'd prepare something like this.
1000612639.korean: 흥, 제법이네. 이런 걸 준비할 줄이야.

1000612640.english: But... if I fall down again next time...

1000612641.english: - The commanders came up to me and thanked me.

1000612642.english: - There are smiles on the faces of the soldiers and the commanders.
1000612642.korean: - 대원들의 얼굴에도, 지휘관들의 얼굴에도 미소가 걸려있다.

1000612645.english: Everyone, enjoy the party that His Majesty has prepared!

1000612646.english: - At Marie's words, the members began to enjoy the party in their own way.
1000612646.korean: - 마리의 말에 대원들은 나름의 방식대로 파티를 즐기기 시작했다.

1000612647.english: - Seeing the members eating, drinking, and laughing while relaxing makes me feel like all the work I've done so far is being rewarded.
1000612647.korean: - 긴장을 풀고 먹고 마시고 웃는 대원들을 보니 지금까지의 일을 전부 보상받는 것 같다.

1000612648.english: It was a great party. Thanks for your hard work.

1000612649.english: - And then I noticed that the doctor is nowhere to be seen.

1000612650.english: - Everyone worked hard, but the one who worked the hardest was the doctor...
1000612650.korean: - 다들 고생했지만, 가장 고생한 건 닥터일텐데...

1000612653.english: The Commander would be happy to enjoy the party. I'll go find the Doctor.
1000612653.korean: 사령관은 파티를 즐기는 게 좋겠군. 닥터는 내가 찾아보지.

1000612655.english: - I was a little worried, but I decided to leave it to Khan and look after the other members.
1000612655.korean: - 조금 마음에 걸리긴 하지만, 칸에게 맡기고 다른 대원들을 살펴보기로 했다.

1000612656.english: Can I just say one thing?

1000612658.english: I wonder how I managed to hide my feelings from the Commander until now.
1000612658.korean: 지금껏 어떻게 사령관 앞에서 마음을 숨겼는지 궁금할 정도야.

1000612662.english: This time, I'll go and clean up the area. Make sure no uninvited guests come.
1000612662.korean: 이번엔 내가 주변을 정리하러 갈게. 불청객이 찾아오지 않도록.

1000612664.english: Okay, then I'm just pretending to go find a doctor.
1000612664.korean: 알았다. 그럼 나는 닥터를 찾는 시늉을 하고있지.

1000612665.english: - In the end, I couldn't find the doctor at the party.
1000612665.korean: - 결국 파티장에서 닥터를 찾을 수 없었다.

1000612666.english: - As I was trying to connect the communication with a worried heart, Leona approached me and told me that the party's finale was ready.
1000612666.korean: - 걱정스러운 마음에 통신을 연결해보려 할 때 레오나가 다가와 파티의 피날레가 준비됐다고 알렸다.

1000612667.english: Yes. The Commander will distribute the gifts he has obtained to the members.
1000612667.korean: 그래. 사령관이 구한 선물들을 대원들한테 나눠줄거래.

1000612668.english: I cleaned up the nearby Metal Parasites. Don't go out of the city.
1000612668.korean: 근방의 철충들을 청소해 두었다. 도시 밖으로 나가지.

1000612669.english: - As I started to move, the agents surrounded me in a wide circle.
1000612669.korean: - 내가 이동하기 시작하자 대원들이 나를 넓게 둘러쌌다.

1000612670.english: - I felt a strange feeling as I watched the soldiers gather by unit and walk in unison.
1000612670.korean: - 부대별로 모여 일사불란하게 걸음을 옮기는 대원들을 보며 묘한 기분이 들었다.

1000612671.english: - Leona, who was walking next to me, spoke to me as if she had noticed my thoughts.
1000612671.korean: - 그런 내 생각을 눈치 챘는지, 옆에서 걷던 레오나가 말을 걸었다.

1000612672.english: How does it feel to be escorted so openly like this?

1000612673.english: - At first glance, the agents appear to be chatting comfortably, but they are still tense.
1000612673.korean: - 언뜻보면 편하게 담소를 나누고 있는듯한 대원들은 그러면서도 긴장을 유지하고 있다.

1000612674.english: - Sometimes when our eyes meet, he gives me a trusting smile as if to tell me not to worry.
1000612674.korean: - 이따금 눈이 마주치면 걱정말라는 듯 신뢰가 가득한 미소를 보내온다.

1000612676.english: - The place where the car ahead stopped was a snowy field with nothing in it.
1000612676.korean: - 앞서 걷던 칸이 멈춘 곳은 아무것도 없는 설원이었다.

1000612677.english: - I looked around at the group in wonder. They all seemed to be standing still, waiting for something.
1000612677.korean: - 의아해서 대원들을 둘러보았다. 다들 멈춰서서 무언가를 기다리는 것 같아 보인다.

1000612678.english: - As I was saying that, a huge aircraft appeared with a low engine noise.
1000612678.korean: - 그런 내 말을 끊으며 낮은 엔진음과 함께 거대한 비행체가 모습을 드러냈다.

1000612680.english: - The agents just stare at it with their eyes wide open.
1000612680.korean: - 대원들은 눈을 커다랗게 뜨고 그것을 올려다보고만 있다.

1000612681.english: - Despite my urgent orders, the soldiers did not move and just chatted with each other.
1000612681.korean: - 내 다급한 명령에도 대원들은 옆 사람과 수군대기만 할 뿐 꼼짝도 하지 않았다.

1000612682.english: To think that you could make this in such a short time... I'm honestly surprised.
1000612682.korean: 이 짧은 시간에 만들어 내다니... 솔직히 놀랍군.

1000612683.english: It turns out he wasn't just a child.

1000612684.english: - The other commanders, as well as Khan and Leona, are leisurely admiring the aircraft.
1000612684.korean: - 다른 지휘관들은 물론, 칸과 레오나도 느긋하게 비행체를 감상하고 있다.

1000612685.english: - That sight made me relax a little, but my doubts still linger.
1000612685.korean: - 그 모습에 조금 긴장이 풀리긴 했지만, 여전히 의문은 가시지 않는다.

1000612687.english: Because it's a reward we give to the commander who has worked hard.

1000612688.english: - Before I could ask what that meant, the doctor came running.
1000612688.korean: - 그게 무슨 말이냐고 물어보기도 전에 닥터가 달려왔다.

1000612691.english: - Looking at the doctor's playfully smiling face, I could roughly understand the situation.
1000612691.korean: - 장난스럽게 웃는 닥터의 얼굴을 보자 대충 상황이 파악됐다.

1000612692.english: Hehehe, that's right. It's a surprise party for you, Big Brother!
1000612692.korean: 히힛, 맞아. 오빠를 위한 깜짝 파티야!

1000612693.english: - It's a surprise party of surprise parties...

1000612694.english: - It's only now that I think about it, but from the moment I first asked the doctor for help, I had a feeling something was off.
1000612694.korean: - 이제와서긴 하지만, 돌이켜보니 처음 닥터에게 도움을 청할때부터 무언가 낌새가 이상하긴 했다.

1000612695.english: - He turned his gaze to the surprised crew members who were looking at the airship floating in the sky.
1000612695.korean: - 하늘에 떠있는 비행선을 보며 놀라는 대원들에게 시선을 돌렸다.

1000612696.english: - It looks like almost everyone is here, but there are still people missing...
1000612696.korean: - 거의 다 모여있는 것 같긴 한데, 없는 인원이...

1000612697.english: I knew you'd say that. All the border guards have been supported, and we'll take care of them later.
1000612697.korean: 그 말 할 줄 알았어. 경계 인원은 전부 지원 받았고, 나중에 따로 챙겨줄거야.

1000612698.english: How about leaving that to us now?
1000612698.korean: 그정도는 이제 우리한테 맡기는 게 어때?

1000612700.english: Commander, you don't have to carry everything alone.
1000612700.korean: 사령관, 혼자서 모든 것을 짊어질 필요는 없다.

1000612701.english: That's right, Big Brother. Don't worry, I've prepared a separate gift for the working ladies.
1000612701.korean: 맞아, 오빠. 근무중인 언니들은 위한 선물은 따로 준비했으니까 걱정하지마.

1000612704.english: - As the doctor spoke, the bottom of the airship opened and drones carrying something poured out.
1000612704.korean: - 닥터의 말과 동시에 비행선의 하부가 열리더니 무언가 싣고 있는 드론들이 쏟아져 나왔다.

1000612706.english: Prepared for my brother who wants to give us a present! This is Orca's own Santa Claus.
1000612706.korean: 우리에게 선물을 주려는 오빠를 위해 준비한! 오르카만의 산타클로스야.

1000612707.english: - I was touched, but my mouth dropped open at the scale of the Doctor.
1000612707.korean: - 감동도 감동이지만, 닥터다운 스케일에 입이 떡 벌어졌다.

1000612708.english: Yeah! It would have been even better if I could have used it as is, but it's a shame...
1000612708.korean: 응! 그걸 그대로 쓸 수 있었으면 더 근사하게 만들었을텐데, 아쉽다...

1000612709.english: If you hold me accountable for my omissions in reporting, I will gladly accept them.
1000612709.korean: 보고 누락에 대한 책임을 묻는다면 달게 받도록 하지.

1000612710.english: I wrapped up the presents my brother brought me one by one... Wow, look at that, brother! My sisters really like it!
1000612710.korean: 오빠가 구해온 선물들을 하나씩 포장하구... 우와, 오빠 저것 봐! 언니들 엄청 좋아해!

1000612711.english: ...It was worth the effort, wasn't it?

1000612712.english: The assembled members are opening their presents. Even from afar, their faces are beaming with smiles.
1000612712.korean: - 모여있던 대원들이 선물을 풀어보고 있다. 멀리서도 만면에 웃음이 가득한 것이 보인다.

1000612714.english: Yeah, it's nothing special... Hehe, I'm a little embarrassed.
1000612714.korean: 으응, 별 건 아닌데... 에헷, 조금 쑥스럽네.

1000612715.english: - The doctor slowly turned towards the gathered team members.
1000612715.korean: - 닥터가 천천히 모여있는 대원들 쪽으로 향했다.

1000612716.english: - The members who were frantically opening their presents also turned towards me.
1000612716.korean: - 정신없이 선물을 풀어보던 대원들도 나를 향해 몸을 돌렸다.

1000612717.english: - The doctor took a small breath and carefully opened his mouth.
1000612717.korean: - 작게 숨을 들이마신 닥터가 조심스럽게 입을 열었다.

1000612719.english: Thanks to you, Big Brother, we were able to end the year so happily.
1000612719.korean: 오빠 덕분에 저희는 이렇게 행복하게 한 해를 마무리할 수 있었어요.

1000612720.english: - The doctor smiled bashfully and nodded.
1000612720.korean: - 닥터가 배시시 웃으며 꾸벅 고개를 숙였다.

1000612721.english: - At the same time, other members also expressed their gratitude to me in various ways.
1000612721.korean: - 그와 동시에 다른 대원들도 나에게 가지각색의 감사인사를 전했다.

1000612722.english: - The Doctor might be upset, but more than that airship, more than all those gift packages...
1000612722.korean: - 닥터가 섭섭해 할지도 모르겠지만, 저 비행선 보다도, 수많은 선물 꾸러미 보다도...

1000612723.english: - Those words of gratitude sunk deeper into my heart.
1000612723.korean: - 감사하다는 그 한마디가 가슴에 더 깊게 스몄다.

1000612724.english: - He hid the inexplicable feeling that was tingling deep in his chest with an awkward smile.
1000612724.korean: - 가슴 깊숙한 곳이 간질간질한, 알 수 없는 감정을 어색한 웃음으로 감췄다.

1000612729.english: You've worked hard. I'll be counting on you next year too.

1000612730.english: I hope you continue to lead us well in the future. But please don't overdo it.
1000612730.korean: 앞으로도 우리를 잘 이끌어줬으면 좋겠군. 단, 무리하지 않는 선에서.

1000612731.english: - I don't know what to say in times like this.

1000612732.english: - As I felt Leona's hand gently stroking my bangs, I heard the doctor's voice.
1000612732.korean: - 가만히 내 앞머리를 쓰다듬는 레오나의 손길을 느끼고 있을때 닥터의 목소리가 들렸다.

1000612734.english: - The doctor, who had been chatting with the agents for a while, looks this way.
1000612734.korean: - 한동안 대원들과 재잘재잘 이야기를 나누던 닥터가 이쪽을 보고있다.

1000612735.english: - The other agents turn their faces toward me one by one. I hear a voice telling me to come over quickly.
1000612735.korean: - 다른 대원들도 차례차례 얼굴을 나에게 향한다. 어서 이쪽으로 오라는 목소리가 들린다.

1000612736.english: - As I walked, Khan and Leona followed me, about half a step behind.
1000612736.korean: - 내가 걸음을 옮기자 칸과 레오나도 반 걸음 정도 뒤에서 나를 따라왔다.

1000612737.english: Big Brother, let's have a toast!

1000612738.english: - Before I knew it, wine was poured into the prepared glasses.

1000612739.english: - As I raised my glass, the other members followed suit and each raised their glass.
1000612739.korean: - 술잔을 들자 대원들도 나를 따라 각자 술잔을 들었다.

1000612741.english: - ......I have such a special younger sister.

1000612742.english: Looks pretty good. You must have had a hard time finding it.

1000612743.english: Huh, it's for the commander, right?

1000612744.english: - My family who is always on my side.

1000612746.english: - I spent some leisurely time relaxing at the hot springs.
1000612746.korean: - 얼마간 온천에서 휴양하며 여유로운 시간을 보냈다.

1000612747.english: - For a while, I was so busy dealing with the agents who were stuck with me all day that I was out of my mind, but when I had some free time, I started to worry again.
1000612747.korean: - 한동안은 하루종일 붙어있는 대원들을 상대하느라 정신 없었지만,&n조금 여유가 생기니 또다시 걱정이 앞섰다.

1000612748.english: - As if she had guessed what I was thinking, Audrey came to me and told me that the party preparations were finished.
1000612748.korean: - 그런 내 생각을 짐작하기라도 한 듯 오드리가 찾아와 파티준비가 끝났다는 말을 전했다.

1000612749.english: - The place we arrived at after following Audrey was not a party venue, but a small... campsite set up nearby.
1000612749.korean: - 오드리의 뒤를 따라 도착한 곳은 파티장이 아니라, 근처에 마련된 작은... 캠핑장이었다.

1000612750.english: Audrey, who had disappeared into a small camper van after telling us to wait a moment, appeared.
1000612750.korean: - 잠시 기다리라는 말을 남기고 작은 캠핑카 안으로 사라졌던 오드리가 모습을 드러냈다.

1000612752.english: I wanted to show it to you first.

1000612753.english: How is it? Tell us what you think.

1000612754.english: - The words came out of my mouth before I could even think.
1000612754.korean: - 뭔가 생각하기도 전에 입에서 말이 흘러나왔다.

1000612755.english: - To that extent... Audrey standing in the snowy field under the starlight was beautiful.
1000612755.korean: - 그정도로... 별빛을 받으며 설원에 서있는 오드리는 아름다웠다.

1000612757.english: - Audrey shook her champagne glass, as if she had been saving it for a while.
1000612757.korean: - 어느새 챙겨둔 건지 오드리가 샴페인 잔을 흔들었다.

1000612759.english: I don't want to go so far as to make the commander drink.
1000612759.korean: 저는 사령관에게 술을 먹여가면서까지 그러고 싶진 않거든요.

1000612760.english: - Memories from not so long ago come to mind...

1000612761.english: - I don't know how it got out... No, I'm not sure about the route...
1000612761.korean: - 어떻게 해서 새어나갔는지는 모르... 아니, 경로는 확실하지...

1000612762.english: - Anyway, ever since the rumor spread that I was weak to alcohol, the members have been offering me alcohol without exception.
1000612762.korean: - 어쨌든 내가 술에 약하다는 소문이 퍼진 후로 대원들은 너나할 것 없이 술을 권해왔었다.

1000612763.english: Of course, I'm not disparaging them. It just shows how much they want a commander.
1000612763.korean: 물론 그 분들을 폄하하는 건 아니에요. 그만큼 사령관을 원한다는 거겠죠.

1000612764.english: I felt like it was a bit too much though.

1000612765.english: - As a result of the internal meeting, drinking was banned on board the Orca.
1000612765.korean: - 결국 내부 회의 결과 오르카 선내에서는 음주가 금지되고 말았다.

1000612766.english: But since this is outside Orca, there's no problem drinking it.
1000612766.korean: 그래도 여기는 오르카 밖이니까 마셔도 문제 없어요.

1000612769.english: Hohoho, that's right. The party will start soon.

1000612770.english: If you're going to drink, let's drink it at the after-party.
1000612770.korean: 마실 거면 뒷풀이 때 마시도록 하죠.

1000612771.english: - Audrey poured champagne into a glass.

1000612772.english: - As I received the offered glass and lightly clinked it, a clear sound spread across the quiet snowy field.
1000612772.korean: - 건네는 잔을 받고 살짝 부딪히자 조용한 설원에 맑은 울림이 퍼졌다.

1000612773.english: In the snowy field where there's no one... Just the two of us...
1000612773.korean: 아무도 없는 설원에... 이렇게 단 둘이...

1000612776.english: - I talked with Audrey for a while over a drink.
1000612776.korean: - 한동안 술잔을 기울이며 오드리와 이야기를 나눴다.

1000612777.english: - Sometimes their eyes met, and more often than not, whenever their fingertips touched, Audrey's eyes would gently curve.
1000612777.korean: - 때때로 시선이 마주치고, &n그보다 가끔 손 끝이 닿을 때마다 오드리의 눈가가 부드럽게 휘어졌다.

1000612778.english: Commander, I said it was my last turn... remember?
1000612778.korean: 사령관, 제가 마지막 차례라고 했던거... 기억하나요?

1000612779.english: There's still time until the party... so why don't we go somewhere where we can be a little more alone?
1000612779.korean: 파티까진 아직 시간이 있으니까... 조금 더 단둘이 있을만한 곳으로, 가지 않을래요?

1000612780.english: - Audrey's question in a subtle tone made me feel playful again.
1000612780.korean: - 은근한 말투로 묻는 오드리의 모습에 또다시 장난기가 솟았다.

1000612781.english: ...That's annoying. You have no idea how disappointed I was just now... Oh my.
1000612781.korean: ...짓궂네요. 제가 방금 얼마나 실망했었는지 아시... 어머.

1000612782.english: - He put his arm around Audrey's waist, who was frowning slightly.
1000612782.korean: - 살짝 인상을 찌푸린 오드리의 허리에 팔을 둘렀다.

1000612784.english: Come on, I've been waiting for you for so long.

1000612786.english: You're going to take it off soon anyway, right? You'll have to wear it again for the party, though.
1000612786.korean: 어차피 곧 벗을거잖아요? 파티 때는 다시 입어야 하겠지만.

1000612787.english: - I hurried towards Orca with Audrey, who was smiling brightly as if she had been hit with a bullet.
1000612787.korean: - 한 방 먹였다는 듯이 씨익 웃는 오드리와 함께 오르카로 발걸음을 서둘렀다.

1000612792.english: Why did you even wash the spare combat uniforms?
1000612792.korean: 그러게 왜 여벌 전투복까지 다 세탁했어요...

1000612793.english: Who would have thought that an emergency would suddenly be declared...
1000612793.korean: 갑자기 비상이 걸릴 줄 누가 알았겠슴까...

1000612794.english: I was just going to relax and eat some Spam today, but what the heck is this!
1000612794.korean: 오늘은 짱박혀서 느긋하게 스팸이나 까먹을까 했는데, 이게 무슨 날벼락임까!

1000612795.english: The Commander has fallen. It's times like these that we must do our job even better.
1000612795.korean: 사령관 각하께서 쓰러지셨잖아요. 이럴 때일수록 저희가 더 제대로 해야 해요.

1000612796.english: That's true. Actually, the Spam I was going to eat...
1000612796.korean: 그건 그렇지 말임다. 사실 먹으려던 스팸도...

1000612797.english: I'm thinking of decorating my tank for the festival...
1000612797.korean: 축제를 맞아 내 전차를 장식할까 하는데...

1000612798.english: I see a few soldiers who can pull a decorated tank.
1000612798.korean: 마침 장식된 전차를 끌만한 병사들이 몇 보이는군.

1000612800.english: O Almighty Azazel, protect me with your eternal light. O Almighty Azazel, protect me with your eternal light... Huhuhu?!

1000612801.english: There we go again... Is it some kind of fear imprinted in our genes...?
1000612801.korean: 또 저러네요... 유전자에 각인된 공포 같은 걸까요...?

1000612802.korean: 여기 아자젤님은 안 계신다, 브라우니 일병.

1000612805.english: I understand that Your Excellency the Commander will be staying on land for the time being.
1000612805.korean: 사령관 각하께서 당분간 육지에 묵으신다는 건 알고 있겠지.

1000612807.english: Yes, so our steel line, which has a lot of numbers, takes care of the outer perimeter.
1000612807.korean: 그래. 그래서 수가 많은 우리 스틸라인이 외곽 경계를 맡는다.

1000612808.english: Not a single rat should be allowed into the area where His Majesty the Commander is.
1000612808.korean: 사령관 각하께서 계신 곳으로는 쥐새끼 한 마리도 들여보내선 안 된다.

1000612809.english: Hurry up and finish clearing the snow and building the base.

1000612811.english: It seems like it's an important mission, so the regimental commander is directly supervising it.
1000612811.korean: 역시 중요한 임무라 연대장님이 직접 감독하시나봐요.

1000612813.english: Ugh... My legs are giving out...

1000612814.english: Stop joking around and get up. Let's finish this work before the regimental commander comes back.
1000612814.korean: 엄살 그만 부리고 일어나요. 연대장님이 다시 오시기 전에 어서 작업을 끝내죠.

1000612818.english: Thank you for your hard work. I guess I can take a break for a moment.
1000612818.korean: 수고 많았어요. 잠깐 숨은 돌릴 수 있겠네요.

1000612819.english: Thank you for your hard work. I came to help, but are you finished with the work?
1000612819.korean: 고생하십니다. 도우러 왔는데, 작업 다 끝나셨나요?

1000612821.english: Then, can I stay a bit longer? Sergeant Ifrit fell asleep after finishing his work...
1000612821.korean: 그럼 잠깐 있다가 가도 될까요? 이프리트 병장님은 작업 끝내시곤 잠들어버리셔서...

1000612822.english: Of course, that's okay. Please sit here.

1000612823.english: Since we're here, let's play a card game...

1000612826.english: The regimental commander is calling you over there.

1000612827.english: Ugh... Don't be so scared just by waving...
1000612827.korean: 으으... 그냥 손짓하시는 것도 너무 무섭지 말임다...

1000612828.english: Let's go. Before it gets completely captured. Yes! I'll be right there!
1000612828.korean: 어서 가요. 완전히 찍히기 전에요. 네! 바로 가겠습니다!

1000612829.english: The ugly hair has already been planted...

1000612832.english: Excellent. I'll leave the guard duty to another squad.
1000612832.korean: 훌륭하군. 경계 임무는 다른 분대에 맡기겠다.

1000612833.english: Let's take a short break until the next order is given.
1000612833.korean: 다음 명령이 하달될 때까지 잠시 휴식하도록.

1000612835.english: I was hoping, and as expected, the regimental commander fought alongside me.
1000612835.korean: 혹시나 했는데 역시나 연대장님이 같이 싸워주셨지 말임다.

1000612836.english: The regimental commander is incredibly scary, but... &n I can't hate him when I see him leading the charge in every battle.
1000612836.korean: 연대장님은 엄청 무섭긴 하지만...&n전투때마다 앞장서시는 걸 보면 도저히 미워할 수가 없지말임다.

1000612838.english: Oh, Gnome. Thanks for the foam concrete support.
1000612838.korean: 아, 노움. 발포 콘크리트 지원 고마웠어요.

1000612841.english: Captain Marie, are you still there?

1000612842.english: It certainly seems like it's time to hear some good news.
1000612842.korean: 분명 좋은 소식이 들릴 때가 된 것 같지 말임다.

1000612845.english: Since it's a wartime situation, His Excellency the Commander is being cautious...
1000612845.korean: 지금은 아무래도 전시다보니, 사령관 각하께서 조심하고 계신다고...

1000612846.english: Yes?! Then what will become of our efforts? We worked so hard to get that!
1000612846.korean: 예?! 그럼 저희의 노력은 어떻게 되는검까! 그거 구하느라 엄청 고생했잖슴까!

1000612847.english: But every time you enter and leave His Majesty's room, your expression becomes much softer.
1000612847.korean: 그래도 각하의 방에 들어갔다 나오실 때마다 표정이 한결 부드러워지시잖아요.

1000612848.english: I never imagined that Captain Marie would have such a girl-in-love face.
1000612848.korean: 마리 대장님이 그런 사랑에 빠진 소녀같은 얼굴을 하실 줄은 정말 상상도 못 했어요.

1000612849.english: That's right. When I see things like that, I, too, want to become a family member soon...
1000612849.korean: 맞아요. 그런 걸 보면 저, 저도 빨리 가족이 되서...

1000612850.english: Sigh, but low-ranking soldiers like us shouldn't be concerned about what others think.
1000612850.korean: 에휴, 그래도 저희같은 말단 병사들은 아무래도 눈치보이지 말임다.

1000612851.english: No matter how much Captain Marie told me not to worry about it...
1000612851.korean: 아무리 마리 대장님이 신경쓰지 말라고 하셨어도...

1000612852.english: Since His Majesty is trying his best, we have no choice but to wait...
1000612852.korean: 각하께서 최대한 노력하고 계시니까 기다리는 수밖에요...

1000612853.english: Oh well... I guess I'll just have to be content with this spam Your Majesty has provided.
1000612853.korean: 에구... 저는 그냥 각하께서 챙겨주신 이 스팸으로 만족해야겠지 말임다.

1000612854.english: I guess the construction is finished, so let's take a break...

1000612856.english: The order came directly from Captain Marie.

1000612857.english: Now that His Excellency the Commander has arrived at the lodgings, he has ordered us to begin our guard duty in earnest.
1000612857.korean: 사령관 각하께서 숙소에 도착하셨으니, 본격적으로 경계 임무를 시작하라고 하시네요.

1000612859.english: Hehe, brownies? Spam, are you going to eat them?

1000612860.english: Ugh... No matter what, I can't neglect my duty to protect His Excellency the Commander.
1000612860.korean: 으으... 아무리 그래도 사령관 각하를 지키는 임무를 소홀히 할 수는 없지 말임다.

1000612863.english: I'll prepare some black tea, so shall we take a break?

1000612864.english: Yeah! I like it! Sister, do you want to eat some black tea and a chocolate bar together?
1000612864.korean: 응! 나는 좋아! 언니, 홍차랑 초코바랑 같이 먹을래?

1000612866.english: It's okay. No one's watching right now. Let's eat together. Okay?
1000612866.korean: 괜찮아. 지금은 아무도 안보고 있어. 우리 같이 먹자. 응?

1000612867.english: Come to think of it... Is that so...? Hmm...

1000612871.english: Thank you all for your hard work. Third-quarter, please take a short break...

1000612874.english: Valkyrie! Sister, eat a chocolate bar too!

1000612875.english: Ah, Alvis... chocolate on the ball...

1000612877.english: Eight! I don't know anymore! Sigh!

1000612878.english: Oh, no! You can't eat my fingers!
1000612878.korean: 아, 안돼! 내 손가락은 먹으면 안돼!

1000612879.english: Mmm... I'm so happy... God bless whoever made the chocolate bar...
1000612879.korean: 으음... 너무 행복해... 초코바를 만든분께 축복 있기를...

1000612881.english: Of course! The three of us will take down all these dark, evil guys.
1000612881.korean: 물론이죠! 우리 셋이서, 이 검고 사악한 녀석을 전부 해치우는거예요.

1000612882.english: Yeah! Don't worry, there are plenty of chocolate bars!

1000612883.english: I never thought I'd be treated to tea in the field... I'm truly grateful.
1000612883.korean: 야전에서 홍차를 대접 받게 될 줄은... 정말 감사합니다.

1000612885.english: Hey, Alvis...? Chocolate bar... Do you have any more?

1000612888.english: Thank you, Alvis. I'll definitely find a tea that suits our Alvis's taste.
1000612888.korean: 고마워요, 알비스. 언니가 우리 알비스 입맛에 맞는 홍차를 꼭 찾아볼게요.

1000612889.english: Ugh... black tea doesn't taste good...

1000612890.english: But Nymph Sister doesn't lie. Alvis will wait.
1000612890.korean: 그래도 님프 언니는 거짓말 안하니까. 알비스가 기다릴게.

1000612893.english: Ah, Alvis... There's chocolate on your cheek... I'll wipe it all off...
1000612893.korean: 아, 알비스... 볼에 초코가... 다... 닦아줄게요...

1000612900.english: Valkyrie, is Leona really okay like this?

1000612902.english: You prepared so hard for the Commander.

1000612903.english: But the commander has collapsed and won't be able to come this way anymore...
1000612903.korean: 그런데 사령관님이 쓰러져버리시고, 더이상 이쪽으로도 못 오실테니까...

1000612904.english: Ah... if that's the reason, then you don't have to worry too much.
1000612904.korean: 아... 그런 이유라면, 너무 걱정하지 않으셔도 됩니다.

1000612906.english: Currently, Captain Leona is in charge of guarding the hot springs where His Majesty is.
1000612906.korean: 현재 레오나 대장님은 각하께서 계신 온천의 수비를 맡고 계십니다.

1000612907.english: And while you're at it... maybe, you'll do it... about ten times...
1000612907.korean: 그리고 그러시는 동안... 아마, 그... 열 번 정도는... 하실...

1000612909.english: Really? Ahhh... This is really, really great! Captain Leona is finally here...!
1000612909.korean: 정말인가요? 아아... 정말 정말 잘됐어요! 레오나 대장님이 드디어...!

1000612910.english: Oh? But if Lady Leona is at the hot springs... will Valkyrie be in command of us sisters?
1000612910.korean: 어라? 그런데 레오나님이 온천에 계시면... 저희 자매들은 발키리님이 지휘하시나요?

1000612911.english: No, Captain Khan will take charge.

1000612912.english: It is said that the two of you discussed it and received permission from His Majesty.
1000612912.korean: 두 분이서 상의하시고, 각하께 허가도 받으셨다고 합니다.

1000612913.english: Yes? That Khan Captain of the Horde?

1000612916.english: I received word that Captain Khan is coming to command us. Is that correct?
1000612916.korean: 칸 대장님이 저희를 지휘하러 오신다는 통신을 받았어요. 맞나요?

1000612918.english: There was an order from Captain Leona to join Captain Khan in ten minutes and follow his instructions.
