1000612918.korean: 10분 뒤에 칸 대장님과 합류한 뒤 지시를 따르라는 레오나 대장님의 명령이 있었습니다.

1000612919.english: That Khan Captain... has now entered the combat zone alone...
1000612919.korean: 그 칸 대장님께서... 지금 홀로 전투지역으로 진입하셨어요...

1000612920.english: Let's hurry. Vera, please bring Alvis.

1000612921.english: The rest of the personnel will move immediately.

1000612922.english: Captain Khan, I'm glad you're safe.

1000612923.english: Thank you, Lieutenant Sand Girl. That was a great assist.

1000612924.english: No. When I arrived, it was already...

1000612925.english: Oh, did I miss the line?

1000612928.english: Oh, no! It was an honor to see you fight.
1000612928.korean: 아, 아닙니다! 전투하시는 모습을 볼 수 있어 영광이었습니다.

1000612929.english: Well, I'm running low on fuel because I came in a hurry... I'll head back for now.
1000612929.korean: 그, 급하게 오느라 연료가 부족해서... 저, 저는 일단 귀환하겠습니다.

1000612932.english: There's still some time left. You're early.
1000612932.korean: 아직 시간이 조금 남았는데. 일찍 왔군.

1000612933.english: I heard reports that the Captain has entered the combat zone. But...
1000612933.korean: 대장님께서 전투지역으로 들어가셨다는 보고를 들어서요. 그런데...

1000612934.english: As expected, it's Captain Khan. All AGS signals have disappeared.
1000612934.korean: 역시 칸 대장님이시군요. AGS 신호가 전부 사라졌습니다.

1000612936.english: It was just a security AGS.

1000612937.english: Lieutenant Sand Girl said she'd return first. Could you guide her to where the sisters are?
1000612937.korean: 샌드걸 중위는 먼저 귀환한다고 하던데, 자매들이 있는 곳으로 안내해주겠나?

1000612938.english: Since we're not yet familiar with each other, I'd like to conduct a briefing, even if it's just briefly.
1000612938.korean: 아직 서로에게 익숙하지 않으니, 간단히라도 브리핑을 진행하고 싶군.

1000612939.english: Yes, I will serve you right away.

1000612940.english: As you may have heard, I've been temporarily assigned to lead the Sisters of Valhalla. It's only a short time, but I ask for your continued support.
1000612940.korean: 들었겠지만, 임시로 발할라의 자매들의 지휘를 맡게됐다. 짧은 시간이지만 잘 부탁한다.

1000612942.english: Sorry, sorry, Alvis! I told you not to do that during the briefing!
1000612942.korean: 죄, 죄송합니다. 알비스! 브리핑 중에 그러면 안 된다고 했잖아!

1000612944.english: No, I was just hungry, so that's good.
1000612944.korean: 아니다. 마침 배가 고팠는데 잘 됐군.

1000612945.english: Could you give me one too?

1000612947.english: Thank you. Then, let's continue the briefing.

1000612948.english: The mission remains unchanged: prepare the supplies needed for the party for the commander.
1000612948.korean: 임무는 변함없다. 사령관을 위한 파티에 필요한 물자 준비를 진행한다.

1000612949.english: There are still areas where enemies remain, so my sisters will take charge of the flanks while I break through.
1000612949.korean: 아직 적들이 남아있는 구역이 있으니, 내가 돌파하는 동안 자매들은 측면을 맡는다.

1000612955.english: You shouldn't underestimate your enemies, but it's not good to waste your time on petty enemies either.
1000612955.korean: 적을 얕봐서는 안되지만, 잔챙이들에게 시간낭비를 하는 것도 좋지 않다.

1000612956.english: I've told you as much as you need, so let's get started right away.

1000612958.english: One of the seven mysteries of Orca has been revealed...

1000612960.english: It was just... Captain Khan was strong.

1000612962.english: No, I was able to fight comfortably thanks to my sisters taking care of the flanks.
1000612962.korean: 그렇지 않다. 자매들이 측면을 맡아준 덕분에 편하게 싸울 수 있었다.

1000612963.english: Certainly, the composition is more stable than our Horde. I hope to see you often in the future.
1000612963.korean: 확실히 구성이 우리 호드보다 안정적이군. 앞으로도 종종 신세지지.

1000612964.english: Re, Captain Leona will be angry...?

1000612966.english: We have confirmed that the area has been secured.

1000612967.english: Okay, then I'll move on to the next area...
1000612967.korean: 알았다. 그럼 난 다음 구역으로 선행할테니...

1000612971.english: Since I'm meeting Captain Khan, I'd like to hear a story or something...
1000612971.korean: 칸 대장님을 뵌 김에 이야기라던가... 듣고 싶어서요.

1000612972.english: I was planning on talking after finishing the mission... Well, I guess it's okay now.
1000612972.korean: 이야기를 나누는 건 임무를 마치고 하려고 했는데... 뭐, 지금도 괜찮겠군.

1000612973.english: What story do you want to hear?

1000612975.english: I'd like to hear about the Horde.

1000612977.english: I heard many stories while interacting with War Wolf.

1000612978.english: Just hearing it, it seems completely different from my sisters... I became curious.
1000612978.korean: 듣기만해도 저희 자매들과는 전혀 다른 것 같아서... 궁금해졌습니다.

1000612979.english: Everything I heard from War Wolf must be true. He's not smart enough to make up stories.
1000612979.korean: 워울프에게 들은 건 전부 사실일거다. 이야기를 지어낼 만큼 똑똑한 녀석이 아니니까.

1000612980.english: I've heard a little bit about it, but the usual briefings...

1000612981.english: There's a reason our briefing is short.

1000612982.english: Do you think those guys will sit quietly and listen to the operation plan?
1000612982.korean: 녀석들이 얌전히 앉아서 작전계획을 들을 것 같나?

1000612984.english: Leona is probably struggling too, just like I was at first.
1000612984.korean: 아마 레오나도 고생하고 있을거다. 내가 처음에 그랬던 것처럼.

1000612985.english: I can vividly picture you closing your eyes and enduring the headache.
1000612985.korean: 눈을 감고 두통을 참는 모습이 눈에 선하군.

1000612986.english: It makes me feel good to imagine the Horde people.
1000612986.korean: 호드 분들의 모습을 상상하면 유쾌한 기분이 듭니다.

1000612987.english: Yeah, they're all good guys, even if they're a little stupid.
1000612987.korean: 그래, 조금 바보같긴 해도 다들 좋은 녀석들이다.

1000612988.english: Now that we've become friends like this, I hope we can continue to get along well.
1000612988.korean: 이렇게 친분을 쌓은 김에 앞으로도 잘 지내줬으면 좋겠군.

1000612989.english: Yes, I will! I'd also like to talk to Quick Camel and Talon Feather.
1000612989.korean: 네, 그럴게요! 퀵 카멜님이랑 탈론페더님이랑도 이야기해보고 싶어요.

1000612990.english: Then let's set up a place after the party for the commander is over.
1000612990.korean: 그럼 사령관을 위한 파티가 끝나고 나서 자리를 마련해보지.

1000612992.english: Okay, if Leona doesn't like it, just let me know.
1000612992.korean: 알았다. 혹시 레오나가 싫다고하면 내게 일러바치면 된다.

1000612994.english: Let's move slowly. As I said before, I'll take the lead in the next area.
1000612994.korean: 슬슬 움직이지. 아까 말한대로 나는 다음 구역으로 선행하겠다.

1000612995.english: Follow me slowly as soon as the supplies are organized.

1000612998.english: Huh? Where did Captain Khan go?

1000612999.english: I was going to give you one more chocolate bar...
1000612999.korean: 초코바 한 개 더 주려고 했는데...

1000613000.english: You moved first. Now let's move too.

1000613001.english: Oh! Sister, what are the 7 great mysteries of Orca? What are they?
1000613001.korean: 아! 언니, 그런데 오르카 7대 미스터리? 그게 뭐야?

1000613002.english: A little while ago, Vera was talking to Sand Girl?
1000613002.korean: 조금전에 베라 언니가 샌드걸 언니랑 이야기하던데?

1000613003.english: The Horde fights amazingly well, don't they?
1000613003.korean: 호드는 정말 신기할 정도로 잘 싸우잖아요?

1000613004.english: So it was a mystery... but it was solved today.

1000613005.english: Woof... Then what about the other six?

1000613006.english: I don't know everything, but for now...

1000613007.english: Every night, the screams of a Bioroid can be heard from a corner of Orca's room...
1000613007.korean: 밤마다 오르카 어느 구석진 방에서 바이오로이드의 비명 소리가 들린다거나...

1000613009.english: There are creepy pictures posted in corridors and rooms that are not shown in the blueprints...
1000613009.korean: 설계도에 나와있지 않는 통로와 방들에 섬뜩한 사진들이 붙어있다거나...

1000613011.english: And... a scary ghost that comes to visit a child who secretly eats a chocolate bar while sleeping...
1000613011.korean: 그리고... 잘때 몰래 초코바를 먹는 아이를 찾아오는 무서운 유령이...

1000613013.english: Hahaha, maybe that was a little harsh? I'll have to appease you later.
1000613013.korean: 우후후, 장난이 조금 심했으려나요? 나중에 달래줘야겠어요.

1000613016.english: Joe, I did make a little noise...
1000613016.korean: 조, 조금 큰 소리를... 내긴, 했습니다만...

1000613017.english: Every day, ah, no... I didn't know such rumors would spread...
1000613017.korean: 매일은 아, 아니었는데... 그, 그런 소문이 돌 줄은...

1000613019.english: Well, it's not just because of Valkyrie... haha...

1000613020.english: If you don't want to experience the thrill, move quickly.
1000613020.korean: 짜릿한 맛을 보고 싶지 않으면 어서 움직이세요.

1000613022.english: Just leave it alone. I'm moving it.
1000613022.korean: 그건 그냥 두시고요. 제가 옮기는 중이니까.

1000613023.english: Okay, I'll move this. Where should I go?
1000613023.korean: 그럼 이건 제가 옮기겠습니다. 어디로 가면 되나요?

1000613024.english: Thank you. We're going in the same direction, so let's go together.

1000613025.english: Since you're here, I guess you're done with your work?
1000613025.korean: 여기로 온 걸 보니, 그쪽 일은 다 끝냈나보죠?

1000613027.english: It's a bit new, but... I've come to realize just how much of a burden His Majesty is on his work.
1000613027.korean: 새삼스럽지만... 폐하께서 업무를 얼마나 부담하고 계셨는지 알게 됐습니다.

1000613028.english: That's fortunate. After the party is over, the master will be able to rest for a while.
1000613028.korean: 다행이네요. 파티가 끝나고 나서도 주인님은 당분간은 쉬실 수 있겠어요.

1000613029.english: Oh, leave it there... It's the doctor's communication.

1000613031.english: I think I can finish it on time somehow.
1000613031.korean: 그럭저럭 시간안에는 끝낼 수 있을 것 같군요.

1000613033.english: Yeah! I think I can somehow manage to get it right here too...
1000613033.korean: 응! 여기도 어떻게든 아슬아슬하게 맞출 수 있을 것 같...

1000613034.english: Oh no! Gremlin! You can't do that!
1000613034.korean: 꺄아! 그렘린 언니! 그거 그렇게 하면 안 돼!

1000613035.english: Things are going well over there too.

1000613037.english: I see. Is this the result of your prediction?

1000613038.english: Haa... This is a really convenient ability.

1000613039.english: If you're curious about what the outcome will be, I can tell you.
1000613039.korean: 결과가 어떻게 되는지 궁금하시면 말씀드릴 수도 있습니다.

1000613040.english: No, that's fine. I can predict that much.
1000613040.korean: 아뇨, 됐어요. 그정도는 저도 예측할 수 있어요.

1000613041.english: Either a complete success or a miserable failure.

1000613042.english: The master will be pleased, because that's the kind of person he is.

1000613043.english: Still... it would be better to make it a success if possible.

1000613044.english: So, what's the best thing I can do out of this mountain of things to make the party a success?
1000613044.korean: 자, 파티를 성공시키려면 이 산더미같은 일 중에 저는 뭘 하는게 가장 좋나요?

1000613045.english: The AGS on the outskirts of the city are being processed, and the noise from the drying yard is attracting the attention of the Metal Parasites.
1000613045.korean: 도시 외곽의 AGS들이 처리된데다, 건조장의 소음이 철충의 이목을 끌고 있습니다.

1000613046.english: I think you should take care of that.

1000613047.english: That makes sense. I can just go alone rather than going through the hassle of forming a unit.
1000613047.korean: 합리적이군요. 굳이 번거롭게 부대를 구성하느니 저 혼자 가면 되니까요.

1000613048.english: Then I'll be back soon. Please take care of me in the meantime.

1000613050.english: The kitchen area... seems to be going well.

1000613052.english: Oh, there's a fire in the oven!

1000613053.english: Ugh, can't you do it right? I'm already so busy!
1000613053.korean: 윽, 똑바로 하지 못하겠어요? 안그래도 바빠 죽겠는데!

1000613054.english: Get out of the way. If you touch me, your sister will be in trouble.
1000613054.korean: 비켜보세요. 손이라도 데면 당신 언니가 난리를 칠 테니까.

1000613055.english: Sorry, sorry... Ugh... It's not a familiar kitchen...
1000613055.korean: 죄, 죄송합니다... 힝... 익숙한 주방이 아니라서...

1000613056.english: I will take charge of it.

1000613057.english: Ugh, thank you... I'll do it again.

1000613058.english: Since you have plenty of time, it would be better to take your time as I taught you.
1000613058.korean: 충분히 시간에 맞출 수 있으니, 가르쳐드린 대로 천천히 하는게 좋겠사옵니다.

1000613060.english: Yes...! Hachiko, I will work hard!

1000613061.english: Looks like the chef has some free time.

1000613062.english: Can't you see my sisters standing in a row, cooking like crazy?
1000613062.korean: 지금 저희 자매들이 늘어서서 정신없이 요리하는 거 안보이시나요?

1000613063.english: How about moving your hands a bit?

1000613064.english: A chef's job is to manage the kitchen.

1000613065.english: Like checking how dented Miss Alice's cake is.
1000613065.korean: 앨리스 양의 케이크가 얼마나 찌그러져 있는지 확인하는 것처럼 말이지요.

1000613066.english: Ugh... I've never done anything like this before, so there's nothing I can do!
1000613066.korean: 큭... 이런 걸 해본 적이 없으니 어쩔 수 없잖아요!

1000613067.english: How about taking a little cue from Vanilla?
1000613067.korean: 바닐라 양을 조금이라도 본받는 게 어떻겠사옵니까?

1000613068.english: You absorbed everything I taught you, and now you are a respectable chef.
1000613068.korean: 가르쳐 드리는 대로 전부 흡수하시곤, 지금은 어엿한 요리사이옵니다.

1000613069.english: Vanilla is a home model, so that's natural.

1000613070.english: I'm a combat machine! Serving you, Master, is enough on the battlefield and in the bedroom...
1000613070.korean: 저는 전투용이라구요! 주인님께 봉사하는 것은 전장과 침실만으로 충분한데...

1000613071.english: Once you see the owner's reaction to the food you made yourself, you will change your mind.
1000613071.korean: 직접 만든 음식을 드신 주인의 반응을 보고 나시면 생각이 달라지실 것이옵니다.

1000613072.english: It's so wonderful to see the owner eating the food I made and saying, "It's delicious."
1000613072.korean: 소첩이 만든 음식을 드시고 '맛있어' 라고 말씀해주시는 주인의 모습을 보는 것은...

1000613073.english: It is the ultimate pleasure, incomparable to anything else in this world.
1000613073.korean: 이 세상 그 무엇과도 비견할 수 없는 극상의 쾌락이옵니다.

1000613074.english: Well, I guess there's nothing to lose.

1000613075.english: Look at this. How do you decorate it?
1000613075.korean: 이것 좀 봐줘요. 장식은 어떻게 하는 거죠?

1000613077.english: At this point, you should be able to do it on your own.

1000613078.english: Then, the concubine will prepare the ultimate dish for her master...
1000613078.korean: 그럼 소첩은 주인을 위한 지고의 요리를...

1000613080.english: Are you planning to interrupt the banquet I am to present to my master?
1000613080.korean: 소첩이 주인께 진상할 만찬을 방해하실 속셈이시옵니까?

1000613081.english: I didn't want to cause a commotion on the feast day the master had prepared for us...
1000613081.korean: 주인께서 준비해주신 잔칫날에 소동을 벌이고 싶지는 않았사옵니다만...

1000613082.english: Those creepy eyes... You helped me a little while ago, so I'll let it slide this time.
1000613082.korean: 그 기분나쁜 눈매... 조금 전에 도와주셨으니 이번만 넘어가드리죠.

1000613083.english: Would you like to take a look here first?

1000613084.english: Just looking at it, you can tell it's a great dish.
1000613084.korean: 보기만 해도 훌륭한 요리라는 것을 알겠사옵니다.

1000613085.english: There's no way Alice would have done it... who on earth would have...
1000613085.korean: 앨리스 양이 하셨을리는 없을테니... 대체 누가...

1000613086.english: Sister Labiata did it. When you were supervising other dishes.
1000613086.korean: 라비아타 언니가 하셨어요. 당신이 다른 요리를 감독할 때 말이죠.

1000613087.english: My sister asked me to tell her that she was sorry if she offended anyone, but if that were the case, I wouldn't stay silent.
1000613087.korean: 언니는 혹시 불쾌했다면 미안하다고 전해달라셨지만, 혹시라도 그렇다면 제가 가만히 있지 않겠어요.

1000613089.english: As a cook... I have to admit it.
1000613089.korean: 요리를 하는 자로서... 인정할 수밖에 없사옵니다.

1000613090.english: This is the dish I will present to my master.

1000613091.english: Wow, you know that. I guess your cooking skills are real.
1000613091.korean: 흥, 그걸 알아보다니, 요리 실력만은 진짜인가보군요.

1000613092.english: Yes, that's right. It was enough for Miss Alice to notice that the cake was ruined by the decorations she had just placed.
1000613092.korean: 그렇사옵니다. 앨리스 양이 방금 꽂은 장식때문에 케이크가 뭉개졌다는 걸 눈치챌 정도로는 말이지요.

1000613095.english: Well, how could I not have said, 'I'm not happy about this kind of shabby party?'
1000613095.korean: 하긴, '이런 허접한 파티 따위 하나도 안 기쁘거든?'이라고 안 한 게 어딥니까.

1000613096.english: If that were the case, I would have watched humanity being rebuilt without even being able to shake hands with the Commander.
1000613096.korean: 그랬다간 사령관님과 손도 못 잡아본 채로 인류가 재건되는 걸 보게 됐겠죠.

1000613097.english: That's fortunate. If things continue as they are now, perhaps in another hundred years or so, the Commander will be the first to extend a hand.
1000613097.korean: 그나마 다행입니다. 지금 상태라면 앞으로 100년 정도만 지나면 사령관님이 먼저 손을 내밀어 주실지도 모르죠.

1000613098.english: The captain is the captain, but until then, we'll just have to suck our thumbs.
1000613098.korean: 대장도 대장이지만, 그때까지 저희도 손가락이나 빨고 있어야겠군요.

1000613099.english: Haha, what a happy future that is. Just imagining it makes me happy.
1000613099.korean: 후후, 정말 행복한 미래네요. 상상만 해도 즐거워져요.

1000613101.english: If you were that worried, why didn't you at least say something?
1000613101.korean: 그렇게 걱정했으면 제대로 말이라도 하지 그랬습니까.

1000613102.english: Or, like Captain Leona, you could bring a gift while the commander is resting...
1000613102.korean: 아니면 레오나 대장님처럼 사령관님 쉬실 때 선물이라도 들고...
